✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
{"id":"ddf62c48-94a0-40cd-9a7a-cdc23aabc2af","identifier":"FRG-243","title":"Characters play contextual animations during interactions","description":"## Problem

Characters play idle_anim during all interactions. Sol reads a bookshelf but stands frozen. Maple uses the stove but looks like she is just standing there.

## Available Assets (48x48 LimeZu sprites)

All 3 characters (Amelia/Lucy/Ash) have:

* reading_48x48.png — for bookshelf, desk
* sit_48x48.png / sit2 / sit3 — for kotatsu, TV, bed
* phone_48x48.png — general interaction fallback

## What to do

1. Map each object to an interaction animation: bookshelf->reading, desk->reading, kotatsu->sit, tv->sit, bed->sit2, stove->phone, fridge->phone, tea_set->phone, easel->phone, bonsai->phone
2. Load these spritesheets in scene.js
3. In startInteract(), play the mapped animation instead of idle_anim
4. On interaction end, return to idle_anim

## Acceptance Criteria

* Each object interaction plays a visually appropriate animation
* Animation plays for the full interaction duration
* Character returns to idle animation when interaction ends","projectMilestone":{"id":"a6eb53b7-72b4-453e-9e23-aa42a629b7a4","name":"M2: Visual sim (main page)"},"priority":{"value":1,"name":"Urgent"},"url":"https://linear.app/chills-linear/issue/FRG-243/characters-play-contextual-animations-during-interactions","gitBranchName":"devlab/frg-243-characters-play-contextual-animations-during-interactions","createdAt":"2026-03-09T04:29:22.729Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-09T08:35:22.366Z","archivedAt":null,"completedAt":null,"dueDate":null,"slaStartedAt":null,"slaMediumRiskAt":null,"slaHighRiskAt":null,"slaBreachesAt":null,"slaType":"all","status":"Dev in Progress","labels":[],"attachments":[],"documents":[],"createdBy":"Project Manager","createdById":"b5a6e03a-2da1-4e78-951b-81497e2a00f7","assignee":"Project Manager","assigneeId":"b5a6e03a-2da1-4e78-951b-81497e2a00f7","project":"AI Aquarium","projectId":"0385a8c7-ba5a-43a3-b223-acf4d1ad6d63","team":"Forge","teamId":"c3ef97d8-21a8-4aa7-a818-298f217864dd"}

USERMESSAGE #16
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Character System — Movement, Perception, A* Pathfinding
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Characters have: id, name, personality, position, action state,
     6→// mood, energy, facing direction. They move between tiles using
     7→// A* pathfinding on the walkable tilemap.
     8→//
     9→// Walk animation alternates walk1/walk2 sprites while moving.
    10→// Perception system returns nearby objects and characters within radius.
    11→
    12→import { MAP, T, MAP_COLS, MAP_ROWS, TILE_SIZE } from './tilemap.js';
    13→
    14→// ── Walkable tiles (everything except walls, fences, water) ──
    15→const UNWALKABLE = new Set([T.WALL, T.WALL_TOP, T.COUNTER, T.COUNTER_L, T.COUNTER_R, T.WINDOW]);
    16→
    17→export function isWalkable(tx, ty) {
    18→  if (tx < 0 || tx >= MAP_COLS || ty < 0 || ty >= MAP_ROWS) return false;
    19→  return !UNWALKABLE.has(MAP[ty][tx]);
    20→}
    21→
    22→// ── A* Pathfinding ──
    23→// Returns array of {tx, ty} waypoints (excludes start, includes goal),
    24→// or null if no path found. Returns [] if already at goal.
    25→
    26→const NEIGHBORS = [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]];
    27→
    28→export function findPath(sx, sy, gx, gy) {
    29→  if (!isWalkable(gx, gy)) return null;
    30→
    31→  const startKey = sy * MAP_COLS + sx;
    32→  const goalKey = gy * MAP_COLS + gx;
    33→  if (startKey === goalKey) return [];
    34→
    35→  const open = [startKey];
    36→  const cameFrom = new Map();
    37→  const gScore = new Map([[startKey, 0]]);
    38→  const fScore = new Map([[startKey, Math.abs(sx - gx) + Math.abs(sy - gy)]]);
    39→  const closed = new Set();
    40→
    41→  while (open.length > 0) {
    42→    // Find node with lowest fScore
    43→    let bestIdx = 0;
    44→    let bestF = fScore.get(open[0]) ?? Infinity;
    45→    for (let i = 1; i < open.length; i++) {
    46→      const f = fScore.get(open[i]) ?? Infinity;
    47→      if (f < bestF) { bestF = f; bestIdx = i; }
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    const current = open[bestIdx];
    51→    if (current === goalKey) {
    52→      const path = [];
    53→      let c = current;
    54→      while (cameFrom.has(c)) {
    55→        path.unshift({ tx: c % MAP_COLS, ty: Math.floor(c / MAP_COLS) });
    56→        c = cameFrom.get(c);
    57→      }
    58→      return path;
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    open.splice(bestIdx, 1);
    62→    closed.add(current);
    63→
    64→    const cx = current % MAP_COLS;
    65→    const cy = Math.floor(current / MAP_COLS);
    66→
    67→    for (const [dx, dy] of NEIGHBORS) {
    68→      const nx = cx + dx;
    69→      const ny = cy + dy;
    70→      if (!isWalkable(nx, ny)) continue;
    71→
    72→      const nKey = ny * MAP_COLS + nx;
    73→      if (closed.has(nKey)) continue;
    74→
    75→      const tentG = (gScore.get(current) ?? Infinity) + 1;
    76→      if (tentG < (gScore.get(nKey) ?? Infinity)) {
    77→        cameFrom.set(nKey, current);
    78→        gScore.set(nKey, tentG);
    79→        fScore.set(nKey, tentG + Math.abs(nx - gx) + Math.abs(ny - gy));
    80→        if (!open.includes(nKey)) open.push(nKey);
    81→      }
    82→    }
    83→  }
    84→
    85→  return null; // no path
    86→}
    87→
    88→// ── Find walkable tile adjacent to an object (for interaction) ──
    89→export function findInteractTile(objPosition) {
    90→  const { tx, ty, tw = 1, th = 1 } = objPosition;
    91→  const candidates = [];
    92→
    93→  for (let x = tx - 1; x <= tx + tw; x++) {
    94→    if (isWalkable(x, ty - 1)) candidates.push({ tx: x, ty: ty - 1 });
    95→    if (isWalkable(x, ty + th)) candidates.push({ tx: x, ty: ty + th });
    96→  }
    97→  for (let y = ty; y < ty + th; y++) {
    98→    if (isWalkable(tx - 1, y)) candidates.push({ tx: tx - 1, ty: y });
    99→    if (isWalkable(tx + tw, y)) candidates.push({ tx: tx + tw, ty: y });
   100→  }
   101→
   102→  if (candidates.length === 0) return null;
   103→  return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
   104→}
   105→
   106→// ── Character class ──
   107→
   108→export class Character {
   109→  constructor(def) {
   110→    this.id = def.id;
   111→    this.name = def.name;
   112→    this.personality = def.personality;
   113→    this.tx = def.tx;
   114→    this.ty = def.ty;
   115→    this.homeSector = def.sector;
   116→    this.energy = 100;
   117→    this.facing = 'down'; // up | down | left | right
   118→    this.action = 'idle'; // idle | walking | interacting
   119→    this.colors = def.colors; // fallback render colors
   120→
   121→    // Movement
   122→    this.path = [];          // waypoints to follow
   123→    this.moveProgress = 0;   // 0–1 progress toward next waypoint
   124→    this.moveSpeed = 2.0;    // tiles per second
   125→    this.prevTx = def.tx;
   126→    this.prevTy = def.ty;
   127→
   128→    // Walk animation (4-frame cycle: walk1→walk2→walk3→walk4)
   129→    this.walkFrame = 0;      // 0–3 → walk1/walk2/walk3/walk4
   130→    this.walkTimer = 0;
   131→    this.walkFrameMs = 200;  // ms between frame advances
   132→
   133→    // Wander AI
   134→    this.targetObjectId = null;
   135→    this.wanderCooldown = 2000 + Math.random() * 5000; // start soon
   136→    this.interactTimer = 0;
   137→
   138→    // Interaction tracking
   139→    this.lastObjectId = null;
   140→    this.pendingAction = 'use';
   141→    this.targetCharId = null;   // ID of a character to face toward upon arrival
   142→
   143→    // Mood system
   144→    this.mood = 'content';       // happy | content | neutral | upset
   145→    this.moodTimer = 0;          // ms until mood resets to content
   146→  }
   147→
   148→  /** Sprite key for the current animation frame. */
   149→  get spriteKey() {
   150→    if (this.action === 'walking') {
   151→      return `${this.id}_walk${this.walkFrame + 1}`;
   152→    }
   153→    return `${this.id}_idle`;
   154→  }
   155→
   156→  get moodEmoji() {
   157→    switch (this.mood) {
   158→      case 'happy': return '😊';
   159→      case 'content': return '😌';
   160→      case 'upset': return '😤';
   161→      default: return null;
   162→    }
   163→  }
   164→
   165→  /** Pixel X position (interpolated between tiles for smooth movement). */
   166→  get px() {
   167→    if (this.path.length === 0) return this.tx * TILE_SIZE;
   168→    const next = this.path[0];
   169→    return (this.prevTx + (next.tx - this.prevTx) * this.moveProgress) * TILE_SIZE;
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  /** Pixel Y position (interpolated between tiles for smooth movement). */
   173→  get py() {
   174→    if (this.path.length === 0) return this.ty * TILE_SIZE;
   175→    const next = this.path[0];
   176→    return (this.prevTy + (next.ty - this.prevTy) * this.moveProgress) * TILE_SIZE;
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  /** Start moving toward a goal tile. Returns true if a path was found. */
   180→  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy) {
   181→    const path = findPath(Math.round(this.tx), Math.round(this.ty), goalTx, goalTy);
   182→    if (path && path.length > 0) {
   183→      this.path = path;
   184→      this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);
   185→      this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);
   186→      this.moveProgress = 0;
   187→      this.action = 'walking';
   188→      this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);
   189→      return true;
   190→    }
   191→    return false;
   192→  }
   193→
   194→  /** Per-frame update: advance position and animation. */
   195→  update(deltaMs) {
   196→    if (this.action === 'walking' && this.path.length > 0) {
   197→      // Walk animation cycle (4 frames)
   198→      this.walkTimer += deltaMs;
   199→      if (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {
   200→        this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;
   201→        this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;
   202→      }
   203→
   204→      // Advance position along path
   205→      const tileDurationMs = 1000 / this.moveSpeed;
   206→      this.moveProgress += deltaMs / tileDurationMs;
   207→
   208→      while (this.moveProgress >= 1 && this.path.length > 0) {
   209→        this.moveProgress -= 1;
   210→        const arrived = this.path.shift();
   211→        this.tx = arrived.tx;
   212→        this.ty = arrived.ty;
   213→        this.prevTx = arrived.tx;
   214→        this.prevTy = arrived.ty;
   215→
   216→        if (this.path.length > 0) {
   217→          this._updateFacing(this.path[0].tx - this.tx, this.path[0].ty - this.ty);
   218→        }
   219→      }
   220→
   221→      // Arrived at destination
   222→      if (this.path.length === 0) {
   223→        this.moveProgress = 0;
   224→        this.action = 'idle';
   225→      }
   226→    } else if (this.action === 'interacting') {
   227→      this.interactTimer -= deltaMs;
   228→      if (this.interactTimer <= 0) {
   229→        this.action = 'idle';
   230→        this.targetObjectId = null;
   231→      }
   232→    }
   233→
   234→    // Decay mood back to content
   235→    if (this.moodTimer > 0) {
   236→      this.moodTimer -= deltaMs;
   237→      if (this.moodTimer <= 0) {
   238→        this.mood = 'content';
   239→        this.moodTimer = 0;
   240→      }
   241→    }
   242→  }
   243→
   244→  _updateFacing(dx, dy) {
   245→    if (dx > 0) this.facing = 'right';
   246→    else if (dx < 0) this.facing = 'left';
   247→    else if (dy > 0) this.facing = 'down';
   248→    else if (dy < 0) this.facing = 'up';
   249→  }
   250→
   251→  /** Enter interaction state (after arriving at an object). */
   252→  startInteraction(objectId) {
   253→    this.action = 'interacting';
   254→    this.targetObjectId = objectId;
   255→    this.lastObjectId = objectId;
   256→    this.interactTimer = 2000;
   257→  }
   258→
   259→  setMood(mood, durationMs = 15000) {
   260→    this.mood = mood;
   261→    this.moodTimer = durationMs;
   262→  }
   263→
   264→  /** Get nearby objects and characters within Manhattan distance radius. */
   265→  getPerception(objects, characters, radius = 5) {
   266→    const nearbyObjects = [];
   267→    const nearbyCharacters = [];
   268→
   269→    for (const obj of objects) {
   270→      const dist = Math.abs(obj.position.tx - this.tx) + Math.abs(obj.position.ty - this.ty);
   271→      if (dist <= radius) {
   272→        nearbyObjects.push({
   273→          id: obj.id,
   274→          name: obj.name,
   275→          state: obj.state,
   276→          distance: dist,
   277→          sector: obj.sector,
   278→        });
   279→      }
   280→    }
   281→
   282→    for (const char of characters) {
   283→      if (char.id === this.id) continue;
   284→      const dist = Math.abs(char.tx - this.tx) + Math.abs(char.ty - this.ty);
   285→      if (dist <= radius) {
   286→        nearbyCharacters.push({
   287→          id: char.id,
   288→          name: char.name,
   289→          action: char.action,
   290→          distance: dist,
   291→        });
   292→      }
   293→    }
   294→
   295→    return { objects: nearbyObjects, characters: nearbyCharacters };
   296→  }
   297→}
   298→
   299→// ── Character definitions ──
   300→
   301→export const CHARACTER_DEFS = [
   302→  {
   303→    id: 'maple',
   304→    name: 'Maple',
   305→    personality: 'Warm, chatty barista who takes pride in her coffee. Runs the café downstairs.',
   306→    sector: 'cafe',
   307→    tx: 3, ty: 12,
   308→    colors: { body: '#e8a87c', hair: '#d4543b', outfit: '#f5e6cc' },
   309→  },
   310→  {
   311→    id: 'sol',
   312→    name: 'Sol',
   313→    personality: 'Quiet, bookish regular who loves the window seat. Friendly when approached.',
   314→    sector: 'cafe',
   315→    tx: 10, ty: 16,
   316→    colors: { body: '#b5835a', hair: '#2d5e2a', outfit: '#7ab648' },
   317→  },
   318→  {
   319→    id: 'nyx',
   320→    name: 'Nyx',
   321→    personality: 'Creative night owl who lives upstairs. Paints, cooks, and is slightly scatterbrained.',
   322→    sector: 'apartment',
   323→    tx: 3, ty: 4,
   324→    colors: { body: '#c4aed0', hair: '#3a2d5e', outfit: '#1a1a2e' },
   325→  },
   326→];
   327→

Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_01JkE8GFACRj9tLgS4CqaWrC",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     2\u2192// Character System \u2014 Movement, Perception, A* Pathfinding\n     3\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Characters have: id, name, personality, position, action state,\n     6\u2192// mood, energy, facing direction. They move between tiles using\n     7\u2192// A* pathfinding on the walkable tilemap.\n     8\u2192//\n     9\u2192// Walk animation alternates walk1/walk2 sprites while moving.\n    10\u2192// Perception system returns nearby objects and characters within radius.\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192import { MAP, T, MAP_COLS, MAP_ROWS, TILE_SIZE } from './tilemap.js';\n    13\u2192\n    14\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Walkable tiles (everything except walls, fences, water) \u2500\u2500\n    15\u2192const UNWALKABLE = new Set([T.WALL, T.WALL_TOP, T.COUNTER, T.COUNTER_L, T.COUNTER_R, T.WINDOW]);\n    16\u2192\n    17\u2192export function isWalkable(tx, ty) {\n    18\u2192  if (tx < 0 || tx >= MAP_COLS || ty < 0 || ty >= MAP_ROWS) return false;\n    19\u2192  return !UNWALKABLE.has(MAP[ty][tx]);\n    20\u2192}\n    21\u2192\n    22\u2192// \u2500\u2500 A* Pathfinding \u2500\u2500\n    23\u2192// Returns array of {tx, ty} waypoints (excludes start, includes goal),\n    24\u2192// or null if no path found. Returns [] if already at goal.\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192const NEIGHBORS = [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]];\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192export function findPath(sx, sy, gx, gy) {\n    29\u2192  if (!isWalkable(gx, gy)) return null;\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192  const startKey = sy * MAP_COLS + sx;\n    32\u2192  const goalKey = gy * MAP_COLS + gx;\n    33\u2192  if (startKey === goalKey) return [];\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192  const open = [startKey];\n    36\u2192  const cameFrom = new Map();\n    37\u2192  const gScore = new Map([[startKey, 0]]);\n    38\u2192  const fScore = new Map([[startKey, Math.abs(sx - gx) + Math.abs(sy - gy)]]);\n    39\u2192  const closed = new Set();\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192  while (open.length > 0) {\n    42\u2192    // Find node with lowest fScore\n    43\u2192    let bestIdx = 0;\n    44\u2192    let bestF = fScore.get(open[0]) ?? Infinity;\n    45\u2192    for (let i = 1; i < open.length; i++) {\n    46\u2192      const f = fScore.get(open[i]) ?? Infinity;\n    47\u2192      if (f < bestF) { bestF = f; bestIdx = i; }\n    48\u2192    }\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192    const current = open[bestIdx];\n    51\u2192    if (current === goalKey) {\n    52\u2192      const path = [];\n    53\u2192      let c = current;\n    54\u2192      while (cameFrom.has(c)) {\n    55\u2192        path.unshift({ tx: c % MAP_COLS, ty: Math.floor(c / MAP_COLS) });\n    56\u2192        c = cameFrom.get(c);\n    57\u2192      }\n    58\u2192      return path;\n    59\u2192    }\n    60\u2192\n    61\u2192    open.splice(bestIdx, 1);\n    62\u2192    closed.add(current);\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192    const cx = current % MAP_COLS;\n    65\u2192    const cy = Math.floor(current / MAP_COLS);\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192    for (const [dx, dy] of NEIGHBORS) {\n    68\u2192      const nx = cx + dx;\n    69\u2192      const ny = cy + dy;\n    70\u2192      if (!isWalkable(nx, ny)) continue;\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192      const nKey = ny * MAP_COLS + nx;\n    73\u2192      if (closed.has(nKey)) continue;\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192      const tentG = (gScore.get(current) ?? Infinity) + 1;\n    76\u2192      if (tentG < (gScore.get(nKey) ?? Infinity)) {\n    77\u2192        cameFrom.set(nKey, current);\n    78\u2192        gScore.set(nKey, tentG);\n    79\u2192        fScore.set(nKey, tentG + Math.abs(nx - gx) + Math.abs(ny - gy));\n    80\u2192        if (!open.includes(nKey)) open.push(nKey);\n    81\u2192      }\n    82\u2192    }\n    83\u2192  }\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192  return null; // no path\n    86\u2192}\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Find walkable tile adjacent to an object (for interaction) \u2500\u2500\n    89\u2192export function findInteractTile(objPosition) {\n    90\u2192  const { tx, ty, tw = 1, th = 1 } = objPosition;\n    91\u2192  const candidates = [];\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192  for (let x = tx - 1; x <= tx + tw; x++) {\n    94\u2192    if (isWalkable(x, ty - 1)) candidates.push({ tx: x, ty: ty - 1 });\n    95\u2192    if (isWalkable(x, ty + th)) candidates.push({ tx: x, ty: ty + th });\n    96\u2192  }\n    97\u2192  for (let y = ty; y < ty + th; y++) {\n    98\u2192    if (isWalkable(tx - 1, y)) candidates.push({ tx: tx - 1, ty: y });\n    99\u2192    if (isWalkable(tx + tw, y)) candidates.push({ tx: tx + tw, ty: y });\n   100\u2192  }\n   101\u2192\n   102\u2192  if (candidates.length === 0) return null;\n   103\u2192  return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];\n   104\u2192}\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Character class \u2500\u2500\n   107\u2192\n   108\u2192export class Character {\n   109\u2192  constructor(def) {\n   110\u2192    this.id = def.id;\n   111\u2192    this.name = def.name;\n   112\u2192    this.personality = def.personality;\n   113\u2192    this.tx = def.tx;\n   114\u2192    this.ty = def.ty;\n   115\u2192    this.homeSector = def.sector;\n   116\u2192    this.energy = 100;\n   117\u2192    this.facing = 'down'; // up | down | left | right\n   118\u2192    this.action = 'idle'; // idle | walking | interacting\n   119\u2192    this.colors = def.colors; // fallback render colors\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192    // Movement\n   122\u2192    this.path = [];          // waypoints to follow\n   123\u2192    this.moveProgress = 0;   // 0\u20131 progress toward next waypoint\n   124\u2192    this.moveSpeed = 2.0;    // tiles per second\n   125\u2192    this.prevTx = def.tx;\n   126\u2192    this.prevTy = def.ty;\n   127\u2192\n   128\u2192    // Walk animation (4-frame cycle: walk1\u2192walk2\u2192walk3\u2192walk4)\n   129\u2192    this.walkFrame = 0;      // 0\u20133 \u2192 walk1/walk2/walk3/walk4\n   130\u2192    this.walkTimer = 0;\n   131\u2192    this.walkFrameMs = 200;  // ms between frame advances\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192    // Wander AI\n   134\u2192    this.targetObjectId = null;\n   135\u2192    this.wanderCooldown = 2000 + Math.random() * 5000; // start soon\n   136\u2192    this.interactTimer = 0;\n   137\u2192\n   138\u2192    // Interaction tracking\n   139\u2192    this.lastObjectId = null;\n   140\u2192    this.pendingAction = 'use';\n   141\u2192    this.targetCharId = null;   // ID of a character to face toward upon arrival\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192    // Mood system\n   144\u2192    this.mood = 'content';       // happy | content | neutral | upset\n   145\u2192    this.moodTimer = 0;          // ms until mood resets to content\n   146\u2192  }\n   147\u2192\n   148\u2192  /** Sprite key for the current animation frame. */\n   149\u2192  get spriteKey() {\n   150\u2192    if (this.action === 'walking') {\n   151\u2192      return `${this.id}_walk${this.walkFrame + 1}`;\n   152\u2192    }\n   153\u2192    return `${this.id}_idle`;\n   154\u2192  }\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192  get moodEmoji() {\n   157\u2192    switch (this.mood) {\n   158\u2192      case 'happy': return '\ud83d\ude0a';\n   159\u2192      case 'content': return '\ud83d\ude0c';\n   160\u2192      case 'upset': return '\ud83d\ude24';\n   161\u2192      default: return null;\n   162\u2192    }\n   163\u2192  }\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192  /** Pixel X position (interpolated between tiles for smooth movement). */\n   166\u2192  get px() {\n   167\u2192    if (this.path.length === 0) return this.tx * TILE_SIZE;\n   168\u2192    const next = this.path[0];\n   169\u2192    return (this.prevTx + (next.tx - this.prevTx) * this.moveProgress) * TILE_SIZE;\n   170\u2192  }\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192  /** Pixel Y position (interpolated between tiles for smooth movement). */\n   173\u2192  get py() {\n   174\u2192    if (this.path.length === 0) return this.ty * TILE_SIZE;\n   175\u2192    const next = this.path[0];\n   176\u2192    return (this.prevTy + (next.ty - this.prevTy) * this.moveProgress) * TILE_SIZE;\n   177\u2192  }\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192  /** Start moving toward a goal tile. Returns true if a path was found. */\n   180\u2192  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy) {\n   181\u2192    const path = findPath(Math.round(this.tx), Math.round(this.ty), goalTx, goalTy);\n   182\u2192    if (path && path.length > 0) {\n   183\u2192      this.path = path;\n   184\u2192      this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);\n   185\u2192      this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);\n   186\u2192      this.moveProgress = 0;\n   187\u2192      this.action = 'walking';\n   188\u2192      this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);\n   189\u2192      return true;\n   190\u2192    }\n   191\u2192    return false;\n   192\u2192  }\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192  /** Per-frame update: advance position and animation. */\n   195\u2192  update(deltaMs) {\n   196\u2192    if (this.action === 'walking' && this.path.length > 0) {\n   197\u2192      // Walk animation cycle (4 frames)\n   198\u2192      this.walkTimer += deltaMs;\n   199\u2192      if (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {\n   200\u2192        this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;\n   201\u2192        this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;\n   202\u2192      }\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192      // Advance position along path\n   205\u2192      const tileDurationMs = 1000 / this.moveSpeed;\n   206\u2192      this.moveProgress += deltaMs / tileDurationMs;\n   207\u2192\n   208\u2192      while (this.moveProgress >= 1 && this.path.length > 0) {\n   209\u2192        this.moveProgress -= 1;\n   210\u2192        const arrived = this.path.shift();\n   211\u2192        this.tx = arrived.tx;\n   212\u2192        this.ty = arrived.ty;\n   213\u2192        this.prevTx = arrived.tx;\n   214\u2192        this.prevTy = arrived.ty;\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192        if (this.path.length > 0) {\n   217\u2192          this._updateFacing(this.path[0].tx - this.tx, this.path[0].ty - this.ty);\n   218\u2192        }\n   219\u2192      }\n   220\u2192\n   221\u2192      // Arrived at destination\n   222\u2192      if (this.path.length === 0) {\n   223\u2192        this.moveProgress = 0;\n   224\u2192        this.action = 'idle';\n   225\u2192      }\n   226\u2192    } else if (this.action === 'interacting') {\n   227\u2192      this.interactTimer -= deltaMs;\n   228\u2192      if (this.interactTimer <= 0) {\n   229\u2192        this.action = 'idle';\n   230\u2192        this.targetObjectId = null;\n   231\u2192      }\n   232\u2192    }\n   233\u2192\n   234\u2192    // Decay mood back to content\n   235\u2192    if (this.moodTimer > 0) {\n   236\u2192      this.moodTimer -= deltaMs;\n   237\u2192      if (this.moodTimer <= 0) {\n   238\u2192        this.mood = 'content';\n   239\u2192        this.moodTimer = 0;\n   240\u2192      }\n   241\u2192    }\n   242\u2192  }\n   243\u2192\n   244\u2192  _updateFacing(dx, dy) {\n   245\u2192    if (dx > 0) this.facing = 'right';\n   246\u2192    else if (dx < 0) this.facing = 'left';\n   247\u2192    else if (dy > 0) this.facing = 'down';\n   248\u2192    else if (dy < 0) this.facing = 'up';\n   249\u2192  }\n   250\u2192\n   251\u2192  /** Enter interaction state (after arriving at an object). */\n   252\u2192  startInteraction(objectId) {\n   253\u2192    this.action = 'interacting';\n   254\u2192    this.targetObjectId = objectId;\n   255\u2192    this.lastObjectId = objectId;\n   256\u2192    this.interactTimer = 2000;\n   257\u2192  }\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192  setMood(mood, durationMs = 15000) {\n   260\u2192    this.mood = mood;\n   261\u2192    this.moodTimer = durationMs;\n   262\u2192  }\n   263\u2192\n   264\u2192  /** Get nearby objects and characters within Manhattan distance radius. */\n   265\u2192  getPerception(objects, characters, radius = 5) {\n   266\u2192    const nearbyObjects = [];\n   267\u2192    const nearbyCharacters = [];\n   268\u2192\n   269\u2192    for (const obj of objects) {\n   270\u2192      const dist = Math.abs(obj.position.tx - this.tx) + Math.abs(obj.position.ty - this.ty);\n   271\u2192      if (dist <= radius) {\n   272\u2192        nearbyObjects.push({\n   273\u2192          id: obj.id,\n   274\u2192          name: obj.name,\n   275\u2192          state: obj.state,\n   276\u2192          distance: dist,\n   277\u2192          sector: obj.sector,\n   278\u2192        });\n   279\u2192      }\n   280\u2192    }\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192    for (const char of characters) {\n   283\u2192      if (char.id === this.id) continue;\n   284\u2192      const dist = Math.abs(char.tx - this.tx) + Math.abs(char.ty - this.ty);\n   285\u2192      if (dist <= radius) {\n   286\u2192        nearbyCharacters.push({\n   287\u2192          id: char.id,\n   288\u2192          name: char.name,\n   289\u2192          action: char.action,\n   290\u2192          distance: dist,\n   291\u2192        });\n   292\u2192      }\n   293\u2192    }\n   294\u2192\n   295\u2192    return { objects: nearbyObjects, characters: nearbyCharacters };\n   296\u2192  }\n   297\u2192}\n   298\u2192\n   299\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Character definitions \u2500\u2500\n   300\u2192\n   301\u2192export const CHARACTER_DEFS = [\n   302\u2192  {\n   303\u2192    id: 'maple',\n   304\u2192    name: 'Maple',\n   305\u2192    personality: 'Warm, chatty barista who takes pride in her coffee. Runs the caf\u00e9 downstairs.',\n   306\u2192    sector: 'cafe',\n   307\u2192    tx: 3, ty: 12,\n   308\u2192    colors: { body: '#e8a87c', hair: '#d4543b', outfit: '#f5e6cc' },\n   309\u2192  },\n   310\u2192  {\n   311\u2192    id: 'sol',\n   312\u2192    name: 'Sol',\n   313\u2192    personality: 'Quiet, bookish regular who loves the window seat. Friendly when approached.',\n   314\u2192    sector: 'cafe',\n   315\u2192    tx: 10, ty: 16,\n   316\u2192    colors: { body: '#b5835a', hair: '#2d5e2a', outfit: '#7ab648' },\n   317\u2192  },\n   318\u2192  {\n   319\u2192    id: 'nyx',\n   320\u2192    name: 'Nyx',\n   321\u2192    personality: 'Creative night owl who lives upstairs. Paints, cooks, and is slightly scatterbrained.',\n   322\u2192    sector: 'apartment',\n   323\u2192    tx: 3, ty: 4,\n   324\u2192    colors: { body: '#c4aed0', hair: '#3a2d5e', outfit: '#1a1a2e' },\n   325\u2192  },\n   326\u2192];\n   327\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Canvas Renderer — Tilemap, Objects, Characters, Particles, UI
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Native resolution: 768×1152 (16×24 tiles at 48px).
     6→// CSS-scaled to fill window while maintaining aspect ratio.
     7→// imageSmoothingEnabled = false for crisp pixel art.
     8→
     9→import { TILE_SIZE, MAP_COLS, MAP_ROWS, MAP_W, MAP_H, MAP, TILE_COLORS, TILE_SPRITES, T, PROP_SPRITES, PROPS } from './tilemap.js';
    10→

    36→  bed:                 'assets/cafe/objects/bed.png',

    41→  plate_empty:         'assets/cafe/objects/plate_empty.png',
    42→  pastry:              'assets/cafe/objects/pastry.png',
    43→  coffee_maker:        'assets/cafe/objects/coffee_maker.png',
    44→};
    45→
    46→// ── Character sprite paths ──
    47→const CHARACTER_SPRITE_PATHS = {
    48→  maple_idle:  'assets/characters/maple_idle.png',
    49→  maple_walk1: 'assets/characters/maple_walk1.png',
    50→  maple_walk2: 'assets/characters/maple_walk2.png',
    51→  maple_walk3: 'assets/characters/maple_walk3.png',
    52→  maple_walk4: 'assets/characters/maple_walk4.png',
    53→  sol_idle:    'assets/characters/sol_idle.png',
    54→  sol_walk1:   'assets/characters/sol_walk1.png',
    55→  sol_walk2:   'assets/characters/sol_walk2.png',
    56→  sol_walk3:   'assets/characters/sol_walk3.png',
    57→  sol_walk4:   'assets/characters/sol_walk4.png',
    58→  nyx_idle:    'assets/characters/nyx_idle.png',
    59→  nyx_walk1:   'assets/characters/nyx_walk1.png',
    60→  nyx_walk2:   'assets/characters/nyx_walk2.png',
    61→  nyx_walk3:   'assets/characters/nyx_walk3.png',
    62→  nyx_walk4:   'assets/characters/nyx_walk4.png',
    63→};
    64→
    65→// ── Object visual colors (fallback when sprites not loaded) ──
    66→const OBJECT_COLORS = {
    67→  // Café objects
    68→  espresso_idle:    '#606065',
    69→  espresso_brewing: '#707075',
    70→  espresso_done:    '#8b6030',
    71→  coffee_maker:     '#a0a0a5',
    72→  display_empty:    '#6a6a8a',
    73→  display_stocked:  '#8a7a5a',
    74→  display_partial:  '#7a6a4a',
    75→  cash_register:    '#a0a0a5',
    76→  sink:             '#8090a0',
    77→  book_closed:      '#a04040',
    78→  book_open:        '#e8e0d0',
    79→  // Apartment objects
    80→  stove_off:        '#404045',
    81→  stove_on:         '#605040',
    82→  stove_done:       '#605040',
    83→  fridge:           '#d0d0d5',
    84→  easel_blank:      '#a09080',
    85→  easel_painting:   '#7060a0',
    86→  easel_finished:   '#60a0d0',
    87→  bed:              '#c0b8d0',
    88→  desk:             '#8b6539',
    89→  // Small items
    90→  cup_empty:        '#e0dcd0',
    91→  cup_full:         '#8b6030',
    92→  plate_empty:      '#e0dcd0',
    93→  plate_food:       '#c0a060',
    94→  pastry:           '#d0b470',
    95→};
    96→
    97→// Fallback color for unknown visuals
    98→const DEFAULT_OBJ_COLOR = '#ff00ff';
    99→
   100→// ── Particle definitions ──
   101→const PARTICLE_DEFS = {
   102→  small_steam:  { color: '#cccccc', size: 2, count: 3, speed: 0.3, life: 800, wobble: true },
   103→  steam:        { color: '#dddddd', size: 3, count: 5, speed: 0.4, life: 1000, wobble: true },
   104→  dark_smoke:   { color: '#444444', size: 4, count: 6, speed: 0.3, life: 1200, wobble: true },
   105→  sparkle:      { color: '#ffee44', size: 2, count: 4, speed: 0.2, life: 600, shape: 'square' },
   106→  interact_sparkle: { color: '#ffffff', size: 1.5, count: 2, speed: 0.5, life: 400, shape: 'square' },
   107→  // Object-specific interaction particles
   108→  oven_embers:    { colors: ['#ff6820', '#ff4400', '#ffaa30'], size: 2, count: 4, speed: 0.4, life: 700, wobble: true },
   109→  dirt_toss:      { colors: ['#8B6914', '#6B4F12', '#A07828'], size: 1.5, count: 5, speed: 0.3, life: 500 },
   110→  water_drops:    { colors: ['#4488dd', '#66aaff', '#3366bb'], size: 1.5, count: 3, speed: 0.4, life: 600, dir: 'down' },
   111→  paint_splatter: { colors: ['#ff4488', '#44aaff', '#ffdd44', '#44dd88', '#aa44ff'], size: 2, count: 5, speed: 0.6, life: 500, dir: 'radial' },
   112→  paper_flutter:  { colors: ['#f0e8d0', '#e8dcc0', '#fff8e8'], size: 2, count: 3, speed: 0.15, life: 900, wobble: true, shape: 'square' },
   113→};
   114→
   115→// ── Object ID → interaction particle type ──
   116→function getInteractParticleType(char) {
   117→  const id = char.targetObjectId;
   118→  if (!id) return 'interact_sparkle';
   119→  if (id.includes('espresso') || id.includes('coffee')) return 'steam';
   120→  if (id.includes('stove')) return 'oven_embers';
   121→  if (id.includes('sink')) return 'water_drops';
   122→  if (id.includes('easel')) return 'paint_splatter';
   123→  if (id.includes('book')) return 'paper_flutter';
   124→  return 'interact_sparkle';
   125→}
   126→
   127→// ── Sprite preloader ──
   128→function loadImage(src) {
   129→  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
   130→    const img = new Image();
   131→    img.onload = () => resolve(img);
   132→    img.onerror = () => reject(new Error(`Failed to load: ${src}`));
   133→    img.src = src;
   134→  });
   135→}
   136→
   137→/**
   138→ * Preload all tile, object, and character sprites.
   139→ * Returns { tiles: Map, objects: Map, characters: Map }
   140→ * Failed loads are silently skipped (renderer falls back to colored rects).
   141→ */
   142→export async function preloadSprites() {
   143→  const tiles = new Map();
   144→  const objects = new Map();
   145→  const characters = new Map();
   146→  const props = new Map();
   147→
   148→  const promises = [];
   149→
   150→  // Tile sprites
   151→  for (const [tileId, path] of Object.entries(TILE_SPRITES)) {
   152→    promises.push(
   153→      loadImage(path)
   154→        .then(img => tiles.set(Number(tileId), img))
   155→        .catch(() => { /* fallback to color */ })
   156→    );
   157→  }
   158→
   159→  // Object sprites
   160→  for (const [visual, path] of Object.entries(OBJECT_SPRITE_PATHS)) {
   161→    promises.push(
   162→      loadImage(path)
   163→        .then(img => objects.set(visual, img))
   164→        .catch(() => { /* fallback to color */ })
   165→    );
   166→  }
   167→
   168→  // Character sprites
   169→  for (const [key, path] of Object.entries(CHARACTER_SPRITE_PATHS)) {
   170→    promises.push(
   171→      loadImage(path)
   172→        .then(img => characters.set(key, img))
   173→        .catch(() => { /* fallback to color */ })
   174→    );
   175→  }
   176→
   177→  // Prop sprites
   178→  for (const [key, path] of Object.entries(PROP_SPRITES)) {
   179→    promises.push(
   180→      loadImage(path)
   181→        .then(img => props.set(key, img))
   182→        .catch(() => { /* fallback — props just won't render */ })
   183→    );
   184→  }
   185→
   186→  await Promise.all(promises);
   187→  return { tiles, objects, characters, props };
   188→}
   189→
   190→export class Renderer {
   191→  constructor(container) {
   192→    this.canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
   193→    this.canvas.width = MAP_W;
   194→    this.canvas.height = MAP_H;
   195→    this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d');
   196→    this.ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;
   197→
   198→    // CSS scaling — fill window, keep aspect ratio
   199→    this.canvas.style.display = 'block';
   200→    this.canvas.style.imageRendering = 'pixelated';
   201→
   202→    // High-res text overlay canvas (renders at display resolution for crisp text)
   203→    this.textCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
   204→    this.textCanvas.style.position = 'absolute';
   205→    this.textCanvas.style.top = '0';
   206→    this.textCanvas.style.left = '0';
   207→    this.textCanvas.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
   208→    this.textCtx = this.textCanvas.getContext('2d');
   209→
   210→    this._resize();
   211→    window.addEventListener('resize', () => this._resize());
   212→
   213→    container.appendChild(this.canvas);
   214→    container.appendChild(this.textCanvas);
   215→
   216→    // Sprite caches (populated by setSprites)
   217→    this.tileSprites = null;      // Map<tileId, Image>
   218→    this.objectSprites = null;    // Map<visualKey, Image>
   219→    this.characterSprites = null; // Map<spriteKey, Image>
   220→
   221→    // Pre-rendered tilemap (offscreen canvas, re-drawn only when sprites load)
   222→    this._tilemapCache = null;
   223→
   224→    // Particle state
   225→    this.particles = [];
   226→
   227→    // Emoji float state
   228→    this.emojiFloats = [];
   229→
   230→    // Speech bubble state
   231→    this.speechBubbles = [];
   232→
   233→    // Status bar text
   234→    this.statusText = '';
   235→
   236→    // Stars (lazy-initialized on first night render)
   237→    this._stars = null;
   238→
   239→    // Ambient particles (fireflies, leaves)
   240→    this._ambientParticles = [];
   241→    this._leafTimer = 0;
   242→    this._waterTiles = null;
   243→    this._windowTiles = null;
   244→    this._lanternPositions = null;
   245→
   246→    // Animation
   247→    this._rafId = null;
   248→    this._lastTime = 0;
   249→    this._renderCallback = null;
   250→  }
   251→
   252→  /** Assign preloaded sprites and bake the tilemap cache. */
   253→  setSprites(sprites) {
   254→    this.tileSprites = sprites.tiles;
   255→    this.objectSprites = sprites.objects;
   256→    this.characterSprites = sprites.characters;
   257→    this.propSprites = sprites.props || null;
   258→    this._bakeTilemapCache();
   259→  }
   260→
   261→  /** Pre-render tilemap to an offscreen canvas for fast blitting. */
   262→  _bakeTilemapCache() {
   263→    const offscreen = document.createElement('canvas');
   264→    offscreen.width = MAP_W;
   265→    offscreen.height = MAP_H;
   266→    const octx = offscreen.getContext('2d');
   267→    octx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;
   268→
   269→    // Fill with base grass color so no transparency bleeds through
   270→    octx.fillStyle = '#d4c5a9'; // café tile floor base
   271→    octx.fillRect(0, 0, MAP_W, MAP_H);
   272→
   273→    for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {
   274→      for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {
   275→        const tile = MAP[row][col];
   276→        const x = col * TILE_SIZE;
   277→        const y = row * TILE_SIZE;
   278→
   279→        const sprite = this.tileSprites && this.tileSprites.get(tile);
   280→        if (sprite) {
   281→          octx.drawImage(sprite, x, y, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
   282→        } else {
   283→          octx.fillStyle = TILE_COLORS[tile] || '#ff00ff';
   284→          octx.fillRect(x, y, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
   285→        }
   286→      }
   287→    }
   288→
   289→    // Bake decorative props on top of tiles (static, never change)
   290→    for (const prop of PROPS) {
   291→      const sprite = this.propSprites && this.propSprites.get(prop.type);
   292→      if (sprite) {
   293→        const pw = (prop.tw || 1) * TILE_SIZE;
   294→        const ph = (prop.th || 1) * TILE_SIZE;
   295→        octx.drawImage(sprite, prop.tx * TILE_SIZE, prop.ty * TILE_SIZE, pw, ph);
   296→      }
   297→    }
   298→
   299→    this._tilemapCache = offscreen;
   300→  }
   301→
   302→  _resize() {
   303→    const aspect = MAP_W / MAP_H;
   304→    const winW = window.innerWidth;
   305→    const winH = window.innerHeight;
   306→    const winAspect = winW / winH;
   307→
   308→    let cssW, cssH;
   309→    if (winAspect > aspect) {
   310→      cssH = winH;
   311→      cssW = winH * aspect;
   312→    } else {
   313→      cssW = winW;
   314→      cssH = winW / aspect;
   315→    }
   316→
   317→    this.canvas.style.width = cssW + 'px';
   318→    this.canvas.style.height = cssH + 'px';
   319→    this.canvas.style.margin = 'auto';
   320→
   321→    this.cssScale = cssW / MAP_W;
   322→    this.cssOffsetX = (winW - cssW) / 2;
   323→    this.cssOffsetY = (winH - cssH) / 2;
   324→
   325→    // Resize text overlay to match display resolution
   326→    if (this.textCanvas) {
   327→      const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
   328→      this.textCanvas.style.width = cssW + 'px';
   329→      this.textCanvas.style.height = cssH + 'px';
   330→      this.textCanvas.width = Math.round(cssW * dpr);
   331→      this.textCanvas.height = Math.round(cssH * dpr);
   332→      this.textScale = this.textCanvas.width / MAP_W;
   333→    }
   334→  }
   335→
   336→  // Convert page click coords to tile coords
   337→  pageToTile(pageX, pageY) {
   338→    const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
   339→    const canvasX = (pageX - rect.left) / this.cssScale;
   340→    const canvasY = (pageY - rect.top) / this.cssScale;
   341→    return {
   342→      tx: Math.floor(canvasX / TILE_SIZE),
   343→      ty: Math.floor(canvasY / TILE_SIZE),
   344→      px: canvasX,
   345→      py: canvasY,
   346→    };
   347→  }
   348→
   349→  // ── Tilemap ──
   350→  renderTilemap() {
   351→    if (this._tilemapCache) {
   352→      this.ctx.drawImage(this._tilemapCache, 0, 0);
   353→    } else {
   354→      // Fallback: draw colored rectangles (no sprites loaded yet)
   355→      const ctx = this.ctx;
   356→      for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {
   357→        for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {
   358→          const tile = MAP[row][col];
   359→          ctx.fillStyle = TILE_COLORS[tile] || '#ff00ff';
   360→          ctx.fillRect(col * TILE_SIZE, row * TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
   361→        }
   362→      }
   363→    }
   364→  }
   365→
   366→  // ── Objects ──
   367→  renderObjects(objects) {
   368→    const ctx = this.ctx;
   369→
   370→    for (const obj of objects) {
   371→      const tx = obj.position.tx;
   372→      const ty = obj.position.ty;
   373→      const pxX = tx * TILE_SIZE;
   374→      const pxY = ty * TILE_SIZE;
   375→      const w = (obj.position.tw || 1) * TILE_SIZE;
   376→      const h = (obj.position.th || 1) * TILE_SIZE;
   377→
   378→      const sprite = this.objectSprites && this.objectSprites.get(obj.visual);
   379→
   380→      if (sprite) {
   381→        // Draw sprite scaled to object tile size
   382→        ctx.drawImage(sprite, pxX, pxY, w, h);
   383→      } else {
   384→        // Fallback: colored rectangle
   385→        const color = OBJECT_COLORS[obj.visual] || DEFAULT_OBJ_COLOR;
   386→        ctx.fillStyle = color;
   387→        ctx.fillRect(pxX + 1, pxY + 1, w - 2, h - 2);
   388→        ctx.strokeStyle = '#000000';
   389→        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
   390→        ctx.strokeRect(pxX + 0.5, pxY + 0.5, w - 1, h - 1);
   391→      }
   392→
   393→      // Oven flash on interaction (bright overlay for first 200ms)
   394→      if (this._activeInteractions?.has(obj.id) && (obj.id.includes('stove') || obj.id.includes('espresso'))) {
   395→        const elapsed = this._activeInteractions.get(obj.id);
   396→        if (elapsed < 200) {
   397→          ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${0.2 * (1 - elapsed / 200)})`;
   398→          ctx.fillRect(pxX, pxY, w, h);
   399→        }
   400→      }
   401→
   402→      // Spawn particles if object has them
   403→      if (obj.particles && PARTICLE_DEFS[obj.particles]) {
   404→        this._maybeSpawnParticles(obj.particles, pxX + w / 2, pxY);
   405→      }
   406→    }
   407→  }
   408→
   409→  // ── Characters ──
   410→  renderCharacters(characters, debug = false) {
   411→    if (!characters || characters.length === 0) return;
   412→    const ctx = this.ctx;
   413→    const now = performance.now();
   414→
   415→    // Sort by py for depth ordering (lower = drawn on top)
   416→    const sorted = [...characters].sort((a, b) => a.py - b.py);
   417→
   418→    for (const char of sorted) {
   419→      const px = char.px;
   420→      // Idle bob: 1px vertical offset on ~800ms cycle (phase offset per character)
   421→      const idleBob = char.action !== 'walking'
   422→        ? (Math.sin(now * 0.008 + char.tx * 2) > 0 ? 1 : 0)
   423→        : 0;
   424→      const py = char.py + idleBob;
   425→      const sprite = this.characterSprites?.get(char.spriteKey);
   426→
   427→      // Bounce effect on interaction start (scale 1.1→1.0 over 100ms)
   428→      let bounceScale = 1;
   429→      if (char.action === 'interacting') {
   430→        const elapsed = 2000 - char.interactTimer;
   431→        if (elapsed >= 0 && elapsed < 100) {
   432→          bounceScale = 1 + 0.1 * (1 - elapsed / 100);
   433→        }
   434→      }
   435→
   436→      if (sprite) {
   437→        if (char.facing === 'left' || bounceScale !== 1) {
   438→          ctx.save();
   439→          const cx = px + TILE_SIZE / 2;
   440→          const cy = py + TILE_SIZE / 2;
   441→          ctx.translate(cx, cy);
   442→          if (bounceScale !== 1) ctx.scale(bounceScale, bounceScale);
   443→          if (char.facing === 'left') ctx.scale(-1, 1);
   444→          ctx.drawImage(sprite, -TILE_SIZE / 2, -TILE_SIZE / 2, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
   445→          ctx.restore();
   446→        } else {
   447→          ctx.drawImage(sprite, px, py, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
   448→        }
   449→      } else {
   450→        // Fallback: simple character shape
   451→        const cx = px + TILE_SIZE / 2;
   452→
   453→        // Body
   454→        ctx.fillStyle = char.colors?.outfit || '#888888';
   455→        ctx.fillRect(cx - 3, py + 6, 6, 8);
   456→
   457→        // Head
   458→        ctx.fillStyle = char.colors?.body || '#ddccbb';
   459→        ctx.beginPath();
   460→        ctx.arc(cx, py + 4, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
   461→        ctx.fill();
   462→
   463→        // Hair
   464→        ctx.fillStyle = char.colors?.hair || '#443322';
   465→        ctx.beginPath();
   466→        ctx.arc(cx, py + 3, 3, Math.PI, Math.PI * 2);
   467→        ctx.fill();
   468→      }
   469→
   470→      // Object-specific interaction particles
   471→      if (char.action === 'interacting') {
   472→        const particleType = getInteractParticleType(char);
   473→        this._maybeSpawnParticles(particleType, px + TILE_SIZE / 2, py + TILE_SIZE / 2);
   474→      }
   475→    }
   476→  }
   477→
   478→  // ── Character labels on text overlay (mood emoji + names) ──
   479→  renderCharacterLabels(characters, debug = false) {
   480→    if (!characters || characters.length === 0) return;
   481→    const ctx = this.textCtx;
   482→    const s = this.textScale;
   483→
   484→    for (const char of characters) {
   485→      const px = char.px * s;
   486→      const py = char.py * s;
   487→      const tileS = TILE_SIZE * s;
   488→
   489→      // Mood emoji above character
   490→      if (char.moodEmoji) {
   491→        ctx.font = `${Math.round(8 * s)}px serif`;
   492→        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
   493→        ctx.fillText(char.moodEmoji, px + tileS / 2, py - 1 * s);
   494→      }
   495→
   496→      // Name label below sprite
   497→      const fontSize = Math.round(5 * s);
   498→      ctx.font = `${fontSize}px monospace`;
   499→      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
   500→      const nameX = px + tileS / 2;
   501→      const nameY = py + tileS + 6 * s;
   502→
   503→      const label = debug ? `${char.name} [${char.action}]` : char.name;
   504→      const metrics = ctx.measureText(label);
   505→      const labelW = metrics.width + 3 * s;
   506→
   507→      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)';
   508→      ctx.fillRect(nameX - labelW / 2, nameY - 5 * s, labelW, 7 * s);
   509→
   510→      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
   511→      ctx.fillText(label, nameX, nameY);
   512→    }
   513→  }
   514→
   515→  // ── Object labels (debug overlay) ──
   516→  renderObjectLabels(objects) {
   517→    const ctx = this.textCtx;
   518→    const s = this.textScale;
   519→    const fontSize = Math.round(5 * s);
   520→    ctx.font = `${fontSize}px monospace`;
   521→    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
   522→
   523→    for (const obj of objects) {
   524→      const tx = obj.position.tx;
   525→      const ty = obj.position.ty;
   526→      const pxX = (tx * TILE_SIZE + ((obj.position.tw || 1) * TILE_SIZE) / 2) * s;
   527→      const pxY = (ty * TILE_SIZE - 2) * s;
   528→
   529→      const text = `${obj.name} [${obj.state}]`;
   530→      const metrics = ctx.measureText(text);
   531→      const textW = metrics.width + 4 * s;
   532→
   533→      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)';
   534→      ctx.fillRect(pxX - textW / 2, pxY - 5 * s, textW, 7 * s);
   535→
   536→      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
   537→      ctx.fillText(text, pxX, pxY);
   538→
   539→      // Timer bar under object
   540→      if (obj.autoNextDuration !== null) {
   541→        const remaining = obj.timeRemainingMs;
   542→        const total = obj.autoNextDuration;
   543→        const pct = (total - remaining) / total;
   544→        const barW = ((obj.position.tw || 1) * TILE_SIZE - 4) * s;
   545→        const barY = ((ty + (obj.position.th || 1)) * TILE_SIZE + 1) * s;
   546→        const barX = (tx * TILE_SIZE + 2) * s;
   547→
   548→        ctx.fillStyle = '#333333';
   549→        ctx.fillRect(barX, barY, barW, 2 * s);
   550→        ctx.fillStyle = pct > 0.85 ? '#d04020' : pct > 0.66 ? '#d0a020' : '#40a040';
   551→        ctx.fillRect(barX, barY, barW * pct, 2 * s);
   552→      }
   553→    }
   554→  }
   555→
   556→  // ── Particles ──
   557→  _maybeSpawnParticles(type, x, y) {
   558→    const def = PARTICLE_DEFS[type];
   559→    if (!def) return;
   560→    const active = this.particles.filter(p => p.type === type).length;
   561→    if (active >= def.count * 2) return;
   562→
   563→    for (let i = 0; i < def.count; i++) {
   564→      const color = def.colors
   565→        ? def.colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * def.colors.length)]
   566→        : def.color;
   567→
   568→      let vx, vy;
   569→      if (def.dir === 'down') {
   570→        vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
   571→        vy = def.speed + Math.random() * 0.2;
   572→      } else if (def.dir === 'radial') {
   573→        const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
   574→        vx = Math.cos(angle) * def.speed;
   575→        vy = Math.sin(angle) * def.speed;
   576→      } else {
   577→        vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
   578→        vy = -def.speed - Math.random() * 0.2;
   579→      }
   580→
   581→      this.particles.push({
   582→        type,
   583→        x: x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8,
   584→        y: y,
   585→        vx,
   586→        vy,
   587→        life: def.life * (0.7 + Math.random() * 0.6),
   588→        maxLife: def.life,
   589→        color,
   590→        size: def.size,
   591→        shape: def.shape || 'circle',
   592→        wobble: def.wobble || false,
   593→        phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
   594→        age: 0,
   595→      });
   596→    }
   597→  }
   598→
   599→  renderParticles(dt) {
   600→    const ctx = this.ctx;
   601→
   602→    for (let i = this.particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
   603→      const p = this.particles[i];
   604→      p.life -= dt;
   605→      if (p.life <= 0) {
   606→        this.particles.splice(i, 1);
   607→        continue;
   608→      }
   609→
   610→      p.x += p.vx;
   611→      p.y += p.vy;
   612→      p.age = (p.age || 0) + dt;
   613→
   614→      const alpha = Math.max(0, p.life / p.maxLife);
   615→      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
   616→      ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
   617→
   618→      // Sine wave wobble for steam/smoke
   619→      const drawX = p.wobble
   620→        ? p.x + Math.sin(p.age * 0.006 + (p.phase || 0)) * 1.5
   621→        : p.x;
   622→
   623→      if (p.shape === 'square') {
   624→        ctx.fillRect(drawX - p.size / 2, p.y - p.size / 2, p.size, p.size);
   625→      } else {
   626→        ctx.beginPath();
   627→        ctx.arc(drawX, p.y, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
   628→        ctx.fill();
   629→      }
   630→    }
   631→
   632→    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
   633→  }
   634→
   635→  // ── Speech Bubble ──
   636→  addSpeechBubble(tx, ty, text, durationMs = 3000) {
   637→    this.speechBubbles.push({
   638→      x: tx * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2,
   639→      y: ty * TILE_SIZE - 10,
   640→      text,
   641→      life: durationMs,
   642→      maxLife: durationMs,
   643→    });
   644→  }
   645→
   646→  /** Add a speech bubble attached to a character (follows their position). */
   647→  addCharacterSpeech(character, text, durationMs = 5000) {
   648→    // Remove any existing bubble for this character
   649→    this.speechBubbles = this.speechBubbles.filter(b => b.character !== character);
   650→
   651→    // Truncate long text for the tiny canvas
   652→    const maxLen = 60;
   653→    const truncated = text.length > maxLen ? text.substring(0, maxLen - 1) + '\u2026' : text;
   654→
   655→    this.speechBubbles.push({
   656→      character,
   657→      text: truncated,
   658→      life: durationMs,
   659→      maxLife: durationMs,
   660→    });
   661→  }
   662→
   663→  setStatus(text) {
   664→    this.statusText = text;
   665→  }
   666→
   667→  _wrapText(ctx, text, maxWidth) {
   668→    const words = text.split(' ');
   669→    const lines = [];
   670→    let current = '';
   671→
   672→    for (const word of words) {
   673→      const test = current ? current + ' ' + word : word;
   674→      if (ctx.measureText(test).width > maxWidth && current) {
   675→        lines.push(current);
   676→        current = word;
   677→      } else {
   678→        current = test;
   679→      }
   680→    }
   681→    if (current) lines.push(current);
   682→    return lines.length > 0 ? lines : [text];
   683→  }
   684→
   685→  renderSpeechBubbles(dt) {
   686→    const ctx = this.textCtx;
   687→    const s = this.textScale;
   688→    const fontSize = Math.round(5 * s);
   689→    ctx.font = `${fontSize}px monospace`;
   690→    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
   691→
   692→    for (let i = this.speechBubbles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
   693→      const b = this.speechBubbles[i];
   694→      b.life -= dt;
   695→      if (b.life <= 0) {
   696→        this.speechBubbles.splice(i, 1);
   697→        continue;
   698→      }
   699→
   700→      // Calculate anchor position (native coords scaled to text canvas)
   701→      let anchorX, anchorY;
   702→      if (b.character) {
   703→        anchorX = (b.character.px + TILE_SIZE / 2) * s;
   704→        anchorY = (b.character.py - 10) * s;
   705→      } else {
   706→        anchorX = b.x * s;
   707→        anchorY = b.y * s;
   708→      }
   709→
   710→      const alpha = Math.min(1, b.life / 500);
   711→      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
   712→
   713→      // Word wrap
   714→      const maxBubbleW = 100 * s;
   715→      const lines = this._wrapText(ctx, b.text, maxBubbleW - 8 * s);
   716→      const lineH = 7 * s;
   717→      const padX = 4 * s;
   718→      const padY = 3 * s;
   719→
   720→      let maxLineW = 0;
   721→      for (const line of lines) {
   722→        const w = ctx.measureText(line).width;
   723→        if (w > maxLineW) maxLineW = w;
   724→      }
   725→
   726→      const bw = maxLineW + padX * 2;
   727→      const bh = lines.length * lineH + padY * 2;
   728→      let bx = anchorX - bw / 2;
   729→      const by = anchorY - bh;
   730→
   731→      // Clamp to canvas bounds
   732→      bx = Math.max(s, Math.min(bx, this.textCanvas.width - bw - s));
   733→
   734→      // Background
   735→      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
   736→      ctx.beginPath();
   737→      ctx.roundRect(bx, by, bw, bh, 3 * s);
   738→      ctx.fill();
   739→
   740→      // Tail
   741→      const tailX = Math.max(bx + 4 * s, Math.min(anchorX, bx + bw - 4 * s));
   742→      ctx.beginPath();
   743→      ctx.moveTo(tailX - 3 * s, by + bh);
   744→      ctx.lineTo(tailX, by + bh + 4 * s);
   745→      ctx.lineTo(tailX + 3 * s, by + bh);
   746→      ctx.fill();
   747→
   748→      // Text lines
   749→      ctx.fillStyle = '#222222';
   750→      for (let l = 0; l < lines.length; l++) {
   751→        ctx.fillText(lines[l], bx + bw / 2, by + padY + (l + 1) * lineH - s);
   752→      }
   753→    }
   754→
   755→    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
   756→  }
   757→
   758→  // ── Status Bar ──
   759→  renderStatusBar() {
   760→    if (!this.statusText) return;
   761→
   762→    const ctx = this.textCtx;
   763→    const s = this.textScale;
   764→    const tw = this.textCanvas.width;
   765→    const th = this.textCanvas.height;
   766→    const barH = 12 * s;
   767→    const y = th - barH;
   768→
   769→    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
   770→    ctx.fillRect(0, y, tw, barH);
   771→
   772→    const fontSize = Math.round(5 * s);
   773→    ctx.font = `${fontSize}px monospace`;
   774→    ctx.fillStyle = '#d0ccc4';
   775→    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
   776→
   777→    // Truncate if too wide
   778→    let text = this.statusText;
   779→    while (ctx.measureText(text).width > tw - 8 * s && text.length > 10) {
   780→      text = text.substring(0, text.length - 4) + '\u2026';
   781→    }
   782→
   783→    ctx.fillText(text, tw / 2, y + 8 * s);
   784→  }
   785→
   786→  // ── Emoji Float ──
   787→  addEmojiFloat(tx, ty, emoji) {
   788→    this.emojiFloats.push({
   789→      x: tx * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2,
   790→      y: ty * TILE_SIZE,
   791→      emoji,
   792→      life: 1500,
   793→      maxLife: 1500,
   794→    });
   795→  }
   796→
   797→  renderEmojiFloats(dt) {
   798→    const ctx = this.textCtx;
   799→    const s = this.textScale;
   800→    ctx.font = `${Math.round(12 * s)}px serif`;
   801→    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
   802→
   803→    for (let i = this.emojiFloats.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
   804→      const e = this.emojiFloats[i];
   805→      e.life -= dt;
   806→      if (e.life <= 0) {
   807→        this.emojiFloats.splice(i, 1);
   808→        continue;
   809→      }
   810→
   811→      const progress = 1 - e.life / e.maxLife;
   812→      const alpha = 1 - progress;
   813→      const yOff = -progress * 20;
   814→
   815→      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
   816→      ctx.fillText(e.emoji, e.x * s, (e.y + yOff) * s);
   817→    }
   818→
   819→    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
   820→  }
   821→
   822→  // ── Highlight a tile (for hover/click feedback) ──
   823→  highlightTile(tx, ty, color = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)') {
   824→    this.ctx.fillStyle = color;
   825→    this.ctx.fillRect(tx * TILE_SIZE, ty * TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
   826→  }
   827→
   828→  // ── Day/Night Cycle ──
   829→
   830→  _initStars() {
   831→    this._stars = [];
   832→    for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {
   833→      for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {
   834→        const tile = MAP[row][col];
   835→        if (tile === T.WALL || tile === T.DOOR) {
   836→          const count = 1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2);
   837→          for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   838→            this._stars.push({
   839→              x: col * TILE_SIZE + Math.random() * TILE_SIZE,
   840→              y: row * TILE_SIZE + Math.random() * TILE_SIZE,
   841→              phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
   842→              size: 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.8,
   843→            });
   844→          }
   845→        }
   846→      }
   847→    }
   848→  }
   849→
   850→  _initWaterTiles() {
   851→    this._waterTiles = [];
   852→    for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {
   853→      for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {
   854→        if (false) { // no water tiles in café
   855→          this._waterTiles.push({
   856→            x: col * TILE_SIZE,
   857→            y: row * TILE_SIZE,
   858→            phase: (row * MAP_COLS + col) * 0.7,
   859→          });
   860→        }
   861→      }
   862→    }
   863→  }
   864→
   865→  _initWindowTiles() {
   866→    this._windowTiles = [];
   867→    for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {
   868→      for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {
   869→        if (MAP[row][col] === T.FLOOR_WOOD || MAP[row][col] === T.FLOOR_TILE) {
   870→          const neighbors = [
   871→            [row - 1, col], [row + 1, col], [row, col - 1], [row, col + 1],
   872→          ];
   873→          const hasWall = neighbors.some(([r, c]) =>
   874→            r >= 0 && r < MAP_ROWS && c >= 0 && c < MAP_COLS && MAP[r][c] === T.WALL
   875→          );
   876→          if (hasWall) {
   877→            this._windowTiles.push({ x: col * TILE_SIZE, y: row * TILE_SIZE });
   878→          }
   879→        }
   880→      }
   881→    }
   882→  }
   883→
   884→  _initLanternPositions() {
   885→    this._lanternPositions = [];
   886→    for (const prop of PROPS) {
   887→      if (prop.type === 'lantern') {
   888→        this._lanternPositions.push({
   889→          cx: prop.tx * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2,
   890→          cy: prop.ty * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2,
   891→        });
   892→      }
   893→    }
   894→  }
   895→
   896→  _getDayNightState(minuteOfDay) {
   897→    const m = minuteOfDay;
   898→    const TRANS = 30;
   899→    const half = TRANS / 2;
   900→
   901→    const NIGHT   = [0, 0, 50, 0.3];
   902→    const GOLDEN  = [255, 160, 40, 0.08];
   903→    const MORNING = [255, 200, 50, 0.1];
   904→    const DAY     = [0, 0, 0, 0];
   905→    const EVENING = [255, 100, 0, 0.15];
   906→
   907→    function lerp4(a, b, t) {
   908→      return [
   909→        a[0] + (b[0] - a[0]) * t,
   910→        a[1] + (b[1] - a[1]) * t,
   911→        a[2] + (b[2] - a[2]) * t,
   912→        a[3] + (b[3] - a[3]) * t,
   913→      ];
   914→    }
   915→
   916→    function lerpN(a, b, t) { return a + (b - a) * t; }
   917→
   918→    // Pre-dawn golden hour at 5am (300), sunrise at 6am (360)
   919→    if (m < 300 - half) return { tint: NIGHT, nightFactor: 1 };
   920→    if (m < 300 + half) {
   921→      const t = (m - (300 - half)) / TRANS;
   922→      return { tint: lerp4(NIGHT, GOLDEN, t), nightFactor: lerpN(1, 0.15, t) };
   923→    }
   924→    if (m < 360 - half) return { tint: GOLDEN, nightFactor: 0.15 };
   925→    if (m < 360 + half) {
   926→      const t = (m - (360 - half)) / TRANS;
   927→      return { tint: lerp4(GOLDEN, MORNING, t), nightFactor: lerpN(0.15, 0, t) };
   928→    }
   929→    // Morning (6-10am)
   930→    if (m < 600 - half) return { tint: MORNING, nightFactor: 0 };
   931→    if (m < 600 + half) {
   932→      const t = (m - (600 - half)) / TRANS;
   933→      return { tint: lerp4(MORNING, DAY, t), nightFactor: 0 };
   934→    }
   935→    // Day (10am-5pm)
   936→    if (m < 1020 - half) return { tint: DAY, nightFactor: 0 };
   937→    if (m < 1020 + half) {
   938→      const t = (m - (1020 - half)) / TRANS;
   939→      return { tint: lerp4(DAY, EVENING, t), nightFactor: 0 };
   940→    }
   941→    // Evening (5-7pm)
   942→    if (m < 1140 - half) return { tint: EVENING, nightFactor: 0 };
   943→    // Sunset golden hour at 7pm (1140), night at 8pm (1200)
   944→    if (m < 1140 + half) {
   945→      const t = (m - (1140 - half)) / TRANS;
   946→      return { tint: lerp4(EVENING, GOLDEN, t), nightFactor: lerpN(0, 0.15, t) };
   947→    }
   948→    if (m < 1200 - half) return { tint: GOLDEN, nightFactor: 0.15 };
   949→    if (m < 1200 + half) {
   950→      const t = (m - (1200 - half)) / TRANS;
   951→      return { tint: lerp4(GOLDEN, NIGHT, t), nightFactor: lerpN(0.15, 1, t) };
   952→    }
   953→    return { tint: NIGHT, nightFactor: 1 };
   954→  }
   955→
   956→  renderDayNightCycle(minuteOfDay, now) {
   957→    const { tint, nightFactor } = this._getDayNightState(minuteOfDay);
   958→    const ctx = this.ctx;
   959→
   960→    // Tint overlay — one fillRect per frame
   961→    if (tint[3] > 0) {
   962→      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${tint[0] | 0}, ${tint[1] | 0}, ${tint[2] | 0}, ${tint[3]})`;
   963→      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, MAP_W, MAP_H);
   964→    }
   965→
   966→    // Window glow — warm amber rectangles on interior tiles at night
   967→    if (nightFactor > 0.1) {
   968→      if (!this._windowTiles) this._initWindowTiles();
   969→      ctx.fillStyle = '#f0d888';
   970→      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.15 + nightFactor * 0.1;
   971→      for (const tile of this._windowTiles) {
   972→        ctx.fillRect(tile.x, tile.y, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
   973→      }
   974→      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
   975→    }
   976→
   977→    // Lantern glow — radial gradient circles at lantern positions
   978→    if (nightFactor > 0.1) {
   979→      if (!this._lanternPositions) this._initLanternPositions();
   980→      const glowAlpha = 0.3 + nightFactor * 0.2;
   981→      const radius = TILE_SIZE * 2;
   982→
   983→      for (const lantern of this._lanternPositions) {
   984→        const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
   985→          lantern.cx, lantern.cy, 0,
   986→          lantern.cx, lantern.cy, radius
   987→        );
   988→        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(240, 216, 136, ${glowAlpha})`);
   989→        gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(240, 216, 136, 0)');
   990→        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
   991→        ctx.fillRect(
   992→          lantern.cx - radius, lantern.cy - radius,
   993→          radius * 2, radius * 2
   994→        );
   995→      }
   996→    }
   997→
   998→    // Stars — twinkling white dots on WALL/DOOR tiles during night
   999→    if (nightFactor > 0) {
  1000→      if (!this._stars) this._initStars();
  1001→      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
  1002→      for (const star of this._stars) {
  1003→        const twinkle = 0.3 + 0.7 * (0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(now * 0.003 + star.phase));
  1004→        ctx.globalAlpha = nightFactor * twinkle;
  1005→        ctx.fillRect(star.x - star.size / 2, star.y - star.size / 2, star.size, star.size);
  1006→      }
  1007→      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
  1008→    }
  1009→  }
  1010→
  1011→  // ── Pond Ripple ──
  1012→  renderPondRipple(now) {
  1013→    if (!this._waterTiles) this._initWaterTiles();
  1014→    const ctx = this.ctx;
  1015→    for (const tile of this._waterTiles) {
  1016→      const shimmer = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(now * 0.002 + tile.phase);
  1017→      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
  1018→      ctx.globalAlpha = shimmer * 0.1;
  1019→      ctx.fillRect(tile.x, tile.y, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);
  1020→    }
  1021→    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
  1022→  }
  1023→
  1024→  // ── Ambient Particles (fireflies, leaves) ──
  1025→  _updateAmbientParticles(dt, minuteOfDay) {
  1026→    const isNight = minuteOfDay >= 1200 || minuteOfDay < 360;
  1027→
  1028→    // Fireflies — night only, up to 6
  1029→    if (isNight) {
  1030→      const fireflyCount = this._ambientParticles.filter(p => p.type === 'firefly').length;
  1031→      if (fireflyCount < 6) {
  1032→        this._ambientParticles.push({
  1033→          type: 'firefly',
  1034→          x: Math.random() * MAP_W,
  1035→          y: MAP_H * 0.2 + Math.random() * MAP_H * 0.6,
  1036→          vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,
  1037→          vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,
  1038→          dirTimer: 1000 + Math.random() * 2000,
  1039→          phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
  1040→          size: 1 + Math.random() * 0.5,
  1041→          life: 8000 + Math.random() * 12000,
  1042→        });
  1043→      }
  1044→    }
  1045→
  1046→    // Leaf — one every 15-30 seconds
  1047→    this._leafTimer -= dt;
  1048→    if (this._leafTimer <= 0) {
  1049→      this._leafTimer = 15000 + Math.random() * 15000;
  1050→      const hasLeaf = this._ambientParticles.some(p => p.type === 'leaf');
  1051→      if (!hasLeaf) {
  1052→        this._ambientParticles.push({
  1053→          type: 'leaf',
  1054→          x: -4,
  1055→          y: Math.random() * MAP_H * 0.3,
  1056→          vx: 0.015 + Math.random() * 0.01,
  1057→          vy: 0.01 + Math.random() * 0.008,
  1058→          rotation: Math.random() * Math.PI,
  1059→          rotSpeed: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.002,
  1060→          life: 30000,
  1061→          color: Math.random() > 0.5 ? '#5a7a3a' : '#7a5a2a',
  1062→        });
  1063→      }
  1064→    }
  1065→
  1066→    // Update all ambient particles
  1067→    for (let i = this._ambientParticles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  1068→      const p = this._ambientParticles[i];
  1069→      p.life -= dt;
  1070→
  1071→      if (p.type === 'firefly') {
  1072→        if (!isNight) p.life = Math.min(p.life, 500); // fade out at dawn
  1073→        p.dirTimer -= dt;
  1074→        if (p.dirTimer <= 0) {
  1075→          p.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
  1076→          p.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
  1077→          p.dirTimer = 1000 + Math.random() * 2000;
  1078→        }
  1079→        if (p.x < 10 || p.x > MAP_W - 10) p.vx = -p.vx;
  1080→        if (p.y < 10 || p.y > MAP_H - 20) p.vy = -p.vy;
  1081→      }
  1082→
  1083→      p.x += p.vx * dt;
  1084→      p.y += p.vy * dt;
  1085→      if (p.rotation !== undefined) p.rotation += p.rotSpeed * dt;
  1086→
  1087→      if (p.life <= 0 || p.x > MAP_W + 10 || p.y > MAP_H + 10) {
  1088→        this._ambientParticles.splice(i, 1);
  1089→      }
  1090→    }
  1091→  }
  1092→
  1093→  renderAmbientParticles(now) {
  1094→    const ctx = this.ctx;
  1095→
  1096→    for (const p of this._ambientParticles) {
  1097→      if (p.type === 'firefly') {
  1098→        const glow = 0.4 + 0.6 * (0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(now * 0.004 + p.phase));
  1099→        const fade = Math.min(1, p.life / 500);
  1100→        ctx.globalAlpha = glow * fade;
  1101→        ctx.fillStyle = '#aadd44';
  1102→        ctx.beginPath();
  1103→        ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  1104→        ctx.fill();
  1105→        // Glow halo
  1106→        ctx.globalAlpha = glow * fade * 0.25;
  1107→        ctx.beginPath();
  1108→        ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size * 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  1109→        ctx.fill();
  1110→      } else if (p.type === 'leaf') {
  1111→        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7;
  1112→        ctx.save();
  1113→        ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);
  1114→        ctx.rotate(p.rotation);
  1115→        ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
  1116→        ctx.fillRect(-1.5, -1, 3, 2);
  1117→        ctx.restore();
  1118→      }
  1119→    }
  1120→
  1121→    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
  1122→  }
  1123→
  1124→  // ── Full render frame ──
  1125→  startLoop(getObjects, getCharacters, options = {}) {
  1126→    this._lastTime = performance.now();
  1127→
  1128→    const frame = (now) => {
  1129→      const dt = Math.min(now - this._lastTime, 100);
  1130→      this._lastTime = now;
  1131→
  1132→      const objects = getObjects();
  1133→      const characters = getCharacters ? getCharacters() : null;
  1134→      const showDebug = options.showDebug && options.showDebug();
  1135→
  1136→      // Build active interactions map for object flash effects
  1137→      this._activeInteractions = null;
  1138→      if (characters) {
  1139→        for (const char of characters) {
  1140→          if (char.action === 'interacting' && char.targetObjectId) {
  1141→            if (!this._activeInteractions) this._activeInteractions = new Map();
  1142→            this._activeInteractions.set(char.targetObjectId, 2000 - char.interactTimer);
  1143→          }
  1144→        }
  1145→      }
  1146→
  1147→      // ── Main canvas (pixel art at native 768×1152 resolution) ──
  1148→      // Fill with solid background to prevent transparency bleed-through
  1149→      this.ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e'; // café night background
  1150→      this.ctx.fillRect(0, 0, MAP_W, MAP_H);
  1151→
  1152→      // Layer 1: tilemap
  1153→      this.renderTilemap();
  1154→
  1155→      // Layer 1.5: pond ripple (water tile oscillation)
  1156→      this.renderPondRipple(now);
  1157→
  1158→      // Layer 2: objects
  1159→      this.renderObjects(objects);
  1160→
  1161→      // Layer 3: characters (sprites only, labels on text canvas)
  1162→      if (characters) {
  1163→        this.renderCharacters(characters);
  1164→      }
  1165→
  1166→      // Layer 4: particles
  1167→      this.renderParticles(dt);
  1168→
  1169→      // Layer 5: day/night cycle tint + stars
  1170→      if (options.getSimClock) {
  1171→        const clock = options.getSimClock();
  1172→        this.renderDayNightCycle(clock.minuteOfDay, now);
  1173→        this._updateAmbientParticles(dt, clock.minuteOfDay);
  1174→      }
  1175→
  1176→      // Layer 5.5: ambient particles (fireflies glow through night tint, leaves)
  1177→      this.renderAmbientParticles(now);
  1178→
  1179→      // ── Text overlay canvas (high-res for crisp text/emoji) ──
  1180→      this.textCtx.clearRect(0, 0, this.textCanvas.width, this.textCanvas.height);
  1181→
  1182→      // Character labels (mood emoji + names)
  1183→      if (characters) {
  1184→        this.renderCharacterLabels(characters, showDebug);
  1185→      }
  1186→
  1187→      // Emoji floats
  1188→      this.renderEmojiFloats(dt);
  1189→
  1190→      // Speech bubbles
  1191→      this.renderSpeechBubbles(dt);
  1192→
  1193→      // Status bar
  1194→      this.renderStatusBar();
  1195→
  1196→      // Debug object labels
  1197→      if (showDebug) {
  1198→        this.renderObjectLabels(objects);
  1199→      }
  1200→
  1201→      // Custom render callback
  1202→      if (this._renderCallback) {
  1203→        this._renderCallback(this.ctx, dt);
  1204→      }
  1205→
  1206→      this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  1207→    };
  1208→
  1209→    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  1210→  }
  1211→
  1212→  stopLoop() {
  1213→    if (this._rafId) {
  1214→      cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);
  1215→      this._rafId = null;
  1216→    }
  1217→  }
  1218→
  1219→  onRender(callback) {
  1220→    this._renderCallback = callback;
  1221→  }
  1222→}
  1223→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
