{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_014zrEEBCqRLiSm9xHVEh8gF",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     2\u2192// Main Simulation Engine\n     3\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Manages the game clock and drives the object engine + characters.\n     6\u2192// Ticks at configurable intervals (~5 seconds default).\n     7\u2192// Provides start/stop/pause controls and an event bus.\n     8\u2192\n     9\u2192import { ObjectEngine } from './objects.js';\n    10\u2192import { OBJECT_DEFS, SECTORS, WORLD_TREE } from './world.js';\n    11\u2192import { Character, CHARACTER_DEFS, findInteractTile } from './characters.js';\n    12\u2192\n    13\u2192export class SimulationEngine {\n    14\u2192  constructor(options = {}) {\n    15\u2192    this.tickIntervalMs = options.tickIntervalMs ?? 5000; // ~5 seconds\n    16\u2192    this.timeScale = options.timeScale ?? 1;              // speed multiplier\n    17\u2192\n    18\u2192    this.objectEngine = new ObjectEngine();\n    19\u2192    this.running = false;\n    20\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    21\u2192    this.elapsedMs = 0;         // total simulation time\n    22\u2192    this.tickCount = 0;\n    23\u2192    this.listeners = new Map();  // event type \u2192 Set<callback>\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192    this._rafId = null;\n    26\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = null;\n    27\u2192    this._accumulator = 0;       // accumulated time toward next tick\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192    // Load world\n    30\u2192    this.objectEngine.addObjects(OBJECT_DEFS);\n    31\u2192    this.sectors = SECTORS;\n    32\u2192    this.worldTree = WORLD_TREE;\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192    // Load characters\n    35\u2192    this.characters = CHARACTER_DEFS.map(def => new Character(def));\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192    // AI integration\n    38\u2192    this.aiEngine = options.aiEngine || null;\n    39\u2192    this.aiMode = false;\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192    // Simulated clock \u2014 starts at 8:00 AM on Day 1\n    42\u2192    // Each tick advances 5 sim-minutes \u2192 1 sim-day per ~24 real minutes at 1x\n    43\u2192    this.simClock = {\n    44\u2192      day: 1,\n    45\u2192      minuteOfDay: 480,\n    46\u2192      simMinutesPerTick: 5,\n    47\u2192      get hour() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay / 60); },\n    48\u2192      get minute() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay % 60); },\n    49\u2192      get timeString() {\n    50\u2192        const h = this.hour;\n    51\u2192        const m = this.minute;\n    52\u2192        const period = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';\n    53\u2192        const h12 = h % 12 || 12;\n    54\u2192        return `${h12}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${period}`;\n    55\u2192      },\n    56\u2192      get dayTimeString() {\n    57\u2192        return `Day ${this.day} \\u2014 ${this.timeString}`;\n    58\u2192      },\n    59\u2192      advance() {\n    60\u2192        this.minuteOfDay += this.simMinutesPerTick;\n    61\u2192        while (this.minuteOfDay >= 1440) {\n    62\u2192          this.minuteOfDay -= 1440;\n    63\u2192          this.day++;\n    64\u2192        }\n    65\u2192      },\n    66\u2192    };\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192    // Last notable event for the status bar\n    69\u2192    this.lastStatusText = '';\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    // Forward object events to our bus\n    72\u2192    this.objectEngine.onTransition((event) => {\n    73\u2192      this._emit('object:transition', event);\n    74\u2192      this._reactToObjectEvent(event);\n    75\u2192    });\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192    // Attach AI engine\n    78\u2192    if (this.aiEngine) {\n    79\u2192      this.aiEngine.attach(this);\n    80\u2192    }\n    81\u2192  }\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192  start() {\n    84\u2192    if (this.running) return;\n    85\u2192    this.running = true;\n    86\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    87\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();\n    88\u2192    this._accumulator = 0;\n    89\u2192    this._emit('engine:start', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n    90\u2192    this._loop();\n    91\u2192  }\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192  stop() {\n    94\u2192    this.running = false;\n    95\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    96\u2192    if (this._rafId) {\n    97\u2192      cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);\n    98\u2192      this._rafId = null;\n    99\u2192    }\n   100\u2192    this._emit('engine:stop', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs, tickCount: this.tickCount });\n   101\u2192  }\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192  pause() {\n   104\u2192    if (!this.running) return;\n   105\u2192    this.paused = true;\n   106\u2192    this._emit('engine:pause', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n   107\u2192  }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192  resume() {\n   110\u2192    if (!this.running || !this.paused) return;\n   111\u2192    this.paused = false;\n   112\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();\n   113\u2192    this._emit('engine:resume', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n   114\u2192  }\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192  // Manually advance by a number of ticks (useful for testing)\n   117\u2192  manualTick(count = 1) {\n   118\u2192    const events = [];\n   119\u2192    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n   120\u2192      const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   121\u2192      this.tickCount++;\n   122\u2192      this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;\n   123\u2192      this._wanderTick();\n   124\u2192      this._updateCharacters(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   125\u2192      events.push(...tickEvents);\n   126\u2192    }\n   127\u2192    this._emit('engine:tick', {\n   128\u2192      tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   129\u2192      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   130\u2192      events,\n   131\u2192    });\n   132\u2192    return events;\n   133\u2192  }\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192  // Interact with an object (character-triggered)\n   136\u2192  interact(objectId, action = 'use') {\n   137\u2192    return this.objectEngine.interact(objectId, action);\n   138\u2192  }\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192  // Get object by id\n   141\u2192  getObject(objectId) {\n   142\u2192    return this.objectEngine.get(objectId);\n   143\u2192  }\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192  // Get all objects\n   146\u2192  getAllObjects() {\n   147\u2192    return this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   148\u2192  }\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192  // Get objects in a sector\n   151\u2192  getObjectsInSector(sector) {\n   152\u2192    return this.objectEngine.getBySector(sector);\n   153\u2192  }\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192  // Get all characters\n   156\u2192  getCharacters() {\n   157\u2192    return this.characters;\n   158\u2192  }\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192  // Full state snapshot\n   161\u2192  snapshot() {\n   162\u2192    return {\n   163\u2192      running: this.running,\n   164\u2192      paused: this.paused,\n   165\u2192      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   166\u2192      tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   167\u2192      tickIntervalMs: this.tickIntervalMs,\n   168\u2192      timeScale: this.timeScale,\n   169\u2192      aiMode: this.aiMode,\n   170\u2192      simClock: { day: this.simClock.day, time: this.simClock.timeString },\n   171\u2192      objects: this.objectEngine.snapshot(),\n   172\u2192      characters: this.characters.map(c => ({\n   173\u2192        id: c.id, name: c.name, tx: c.tx, ty: c.ty,\n   174\u2192        action: c.action, facing: c.facing, mood: c.mood,\n   175\u2192        targetObjectId: c.targetObjectId,\n   176\u2192      })),\n   177\u2192    };\n   178\u2192  }\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Event bus \u2500\u2500\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192  on(eventType, callback) {\n   183\u2192    if (!this.listeners.has(eventType)) {\n   184\u2192      this.listeners.set(eventType, new Set());\n   185\u2192    }\n   186\u2192    this.listeners.get(eventType).add(callback);\n   187\u2192    return () => this.off(eventType, callback);\n   188\u2192  }\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192  off(eventType, callback) {\n   191\u2192    this.listeners.get(eventType)?.delete(callback);\n   192\u2192  }\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192  _emit(eventType, data) {\n   195\u2192    const callbacks = this.listeners.get(eventType);\n   196\u2192    if (callbacks) {\n   197\u2192      for (const cb of callbacks) {\n   198\u2192        cb(data);\n   199\u2192      }\n   200\u2192    }\n   201\u2192    // Also emit wildcard\n   202\u2192    const wildcards = this.listeners.get('*');\n   203\u2192    if (wildcards) {\n   204\u2192      for (const cb of wildcards) {\n   205\u2192        cb({ type: eventType, ...data });\n   206\u2192      }\n   207\u2192    }\n   208\u2192  }\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Character AI / Wander behavior \u2500\u2500\n   211\u2192\n   212\u2192  _wanderTick() {\n   213\u2192    // Advance simulated clock each tick\n   214\u2192    this.simClock.advance();\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n   217\u2192      if (char.action !== 'idle') continue;\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192      // AI mode: delegate to AI decision engine\n   220\u2192      if (this.aiMode && this.aiEngine) {\n   221\u2192        if (!this.aiEngine.isPending(char.id)) {\n   222\u2192          this.aiEngine.tick(char, this.tickIntervalMs);\n   223\u2192        }\n   224\u2192        continue;\n   225\u2192      }\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192      // Random wander with cooldown\n   228\u2192      char.wanderCooldown -= this.tickIntervalMs;\n   229\u2192      if (char.wanderCooldown > 0) continue;\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192      // Priority actions first (reactive behavior), then random wander\n   232\u2192      const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);\n   233\u2192      const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);\n   234\u2192      const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';\n   235\u2192\n   236\u2192      if (!target) {\n   237\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   238\u2192        continue;\n   239\u2192      }\n   240\u2192\n   241\u2192      const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);\n   242\u2192      if (!tile) {\n   243\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   244\u2192        continue;\n   245\u2192      }\n   246\u2192\n   247\u2192      // Already adjacent \u2014 interact directly\n   248\u2192      const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);\n   249\u2192      if (atTarget) {\n   250\u2192        this._doInteraction(char, target, action);\n   251\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;\n   252\u2192      } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   253\u2192        char.targetObjectId = target.id;\n   254\u2192        char.pendingAction = action;\n   255\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;\n   256\u2192      } else {\n   257\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   258\u2192      }\n   259\u2192    }\n   260\u2192  }\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192  /** Immediate random wander (no cooldown) \u2014 used as AI fallback. */\n   263\u2192  _randomWander(char) {\n   264\u2192    const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);\n   265\u2192    const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);\n   266\u2192    const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';\n   267\u2192\n   268\u2192    if (!target) return;\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192    const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);\n   271\u2192    if (!tile) return;\n   272\u2192\n   273\u2192    const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);\n   274\u2192    if (atTarget) {\n   275\u2192      this._doInteraction(char, target, action);\n   276\u2192    } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   277\u2192      char.targetObjectId = target.id;\n   278\u2192      char.pendingAction = action;\n   279\u2192    }\n   280\u2192  }\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192  _updateCharacters(deltaMs) {\n   283\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n   284\u2192      const wasWalking = char.action === 'walking';\n   285\u2192      char.update(deltaMs);\n   286\u2192\n   287\u2192      // Character just arrived at destination\n   288\u2192      if (wasWalking && char.action === 'idle') {\n   289\u2192        if (char.targetObjectId) {\n   290\u2192          const obj = this.objectEngine.get(char.targetObjectId);\n   291\u2192          if (obj) {\n   292\u2192            this._doInteraction(char, obj, char.pendingAction || 'use');\n   293\u2192          } else {\n   294\u2192            char.targetObjectId = null;\n   295\u2192          }\n   296\u2192          char.pendingAction = 'use';\n   297\u2192        } else if (char.targetCharId) {\n   298\u2192          // Character arrived near another character for conversation \u2014 face each other\n   299\u2192          const target = this.characters.find(c => c.id === char.targetCharId);\n   300\u2192          if (target) {\n   301\u2192            char._updateFacing(target.tx - char.tx, target.ty - char.ty);\n   302\u2192            target._updateFacing(char.tx - target.tx, char.ty - target.ty);\n   303\u2192          }\n   304\u2192          char.targetCharId = null;\n   305\u2192        }\n   306\u2192      }\n   307\u2192    }\n   308\u2192  }\n   309\u2192\n   310\u2192  _doInteraction(char, obj, action = 'use') {\n   311\u2192    // Face toward the object\n   312\u2192    const objCx = obj.position.tx + (obj.position.tw || 1) / 2;\n   313\u2192    const objCy = obj.position.ty + (obj.position.th || 1) / 2;\n   314\u2192    const dx = objCx - char.tx;\n   315\u2192    const dy = objCy - char.ty;\n   316\u2192    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {\n   317\u2192      char._updateFacing(dx, 0);\n   318\u2192    } else {\n   319\u2192      char._updateFacing(0, dy);\n   320\u2192    }\n   321\u2192\n   322\u2192    const event = this.objectEngine.interact(obj.id, action);\n   323\u2192    if (event) {\n   324\u2192      char.startInteraction(obj.id);\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192      // Successful interaction \u2192 happy (unless already upset)\n   327\u2192      if (char.mood !== 'upset') {\n   328\u2192        char.setMood('happy', 5000);\n   329\u2192      }\n   330\u2192\n   331\u2192      this._emit('character:interact', {\n   332\u2192        characterId: char.id, characterName: char.name,\n   333\u2192        objectId: obj.id, objectName: event.objectName,\n   334\u2192        from: event.from, to: event.to,\n   335\u2192        produces: event.produces || null,\n   336\u2192        emoji: event.emoji || null,\n   337\u2192      });\n   338\u2192    } else {\n   339\u2192      char.targetObjectId = null;\n   340\u2192    }\n   341\u2192  }\n   342\u2192\n   343\u2192  _getPriorityTarget(char) {\n   344\u2192    // Sol: pick up book if closed and nearby\n   345\u2192    if (char.id === 'sol') {\n   346\u2192      const book = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_book');\n   347\u2192      if (book && book.state === 'closed') {\n   348\u2192        const dist = Math.abs(book.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(book.position.ty - char.ty);\n   349\u2192        if (dist <= 6) {\n   350\u2192          return { obj: book, action: 'use' };\n   351\u2192        }\n   352\u2192      }\n   353\u2192    }\n   354\u2192\n   355\u2192    // Non-Maple near stocked display \u2192 take pastry\n   356\u2192    if (char.id !== 'maple') {\n   357\u2192      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   358\u2192      if (display && display.state === 'stocked') {\n   359\u2192        const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);\n   360\u2192        if (dist <= 8) {\n   361\u2192          return { obj: display, action: 'use' };\n   362\u2192        }\n   363\u2192      }\n   364\u2192    }\n   365\u2192\n   366\u2192    // Maple: restock empty display case\n   367\u2192    if (char.id === 'maple') {\n   368\u2192      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   369\u2192      if (display && display.state === 'empty') {\n   370\u2192        return { obj: display, action: 'use' };\n   371\u2192      }\n   372\u2192    }\n   373\u2192\n   374\u2192    return null;\n   375\u2192  }\n   376\u2192\n   377\u2192  _pickWanderTarget(char) {\n   378\u2192    const allObjects = this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   379\u2192\n   380\u2192    // 60% home sector, 40% any sector\n   381\u2192    let candidates;\n   382\u2192    if (Math.random() < 0.6) {\n   383\u2192      candidates = allObjects.filter(o => o.sector === char.homeSector);\n   384\u2192      if (candidates.length === 0) candidates = allObjects;\n   385\u2192    } else {\n   386\u2192      candidates = allObjects;\n   387\u2192    }\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192    // Avoid repeating last interaction\n   390\u2192    if (char.lastObjectId && candidates.length > 1) {\n   391\u2192      candidates = candidates.filter(o => o.id !== char.lastObjectId);\n   392\u2192    }\n   393\u2192\n   394\u2192    if (candidates.length === 0) return null;\n   395\u2192    return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];\n   396\u2192  }\n   397\u2192\n   398\u2192  _reactToObjectEvent(event) {\n   399\u2192    // Espresso done \u2192 Maple happy\n   400\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_espresso' && event.to === 'done') {\n   401\u2192      const maple = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'maple');\n   402\u2192      if (maple) maple.setMood('happy', 10000);\n   403\u2192    }\n   404\u2192\n   405\u2192    // Easel finished \u2192 Nyx happy\n   406\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'apt_easel' && event.to === 'finished') {\n   407\u2192      const nyx = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'nyx');\n   408\u2192      if (nyx) nyx.setMood('happy', 20000);\n   409\u2192    }\n   410\u2192\n   411\u2192    // Display restocked \u2192 nearby characters happy\n   412\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_display' && event.to === 'stocked') {\n   413\u2192      for (const char of this.characters) {\n   414\u2192        const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   415\u2192        if (display) {\n   416\u2192          const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);\n   417\u2192          if (dist <= 6) char.setMood('happy', 10000);\n   418\u2192        }\n   419\u2192      }\n   420\u2192    }\n   421\u2192  }\n   422\u2192\n   423\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Internal loop \u2500\u2500\n   424\u2192\n   425\u2192  _loop() {\n   426\u2192    if (!this.running) return;\n   427\u2192\n   428\u2192    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame((timestamp) => {\n   429\u2192      if (!this.running) return;\n   430\u2192\n   431\u2192      if (!this.paused) {\n   432\u2192        const rawDelta = timestamp - this._lastTimestamp;\n   433\u2192        const delta = Math.min(rawDelta, 500) * this.timeScale; // cap delta, apply scale\n   434\u2192\n   435\u2192        this._accumulator += delta;\n   436\u2192\n   437\u2192        // Process full ticks\n   438\u2192        while (this._accumulator >= this.tickIntervalMs) {\n   439\u2192          this._accumulator -= this.tickIntervalMs;\n   440\u2192          const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   441\u2192          this.tickCount++;\n   442\u2192          this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;\n   443\u2192\n   444\u2192          this._wanderTick();\n   445\u2192\n   446\u2192          this._emit('engine:tick', {\n   447\u2192            tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   448\u2192            elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   449\u2192            events: tickEvents,\n   450\u2192          });\n   451\u2192        }\n   452\u2192\n   453\u2192        // Smooth character movement each frame\n   454\u2192        this._updateCharacters(delta);\n   455\u2192      }\n   456\u2192\n   457\u2192      this._lastTimestamp = timestamp;\n   458\u2192      this._loop();\n   459\u2192    });\n   460\u2192  }\n   461\u2192}\n   462\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware.      1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Object State Machine Engine
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Objects are defined as JSON with state machines. Each state can have:
     6→//   - visual: string descriptor for renderer
     7→//   - particles: optional particle effect name
     8→//   - emoji: optional emoji to float on enter
     9→//   - auto_next: { state, after (seconds) } — timed auto-transition
    10→//   - transitions: { action_name: { next, duration?, requires?, produces?, target? } }
    11→//
    12→// The engine ticks all objects, advancing auto_next timers.
    13→// Characters trigger transitions via interact(objectId, action).
    14→
    15→export class ObjectInstance {
    16→  constructor(def) {
    17→    this.id = def.id;
    18→    this.name = def.name;
    19→    this.sector = def.sector;
    20→    this.arena = def.arena;
    21→    this.position = { ...def.position };
    22→    this.states = def.states;
    23→    this.state = def.state || Object.keys(def.states)[0];
    24→    this.timer = 0; // ms elapsed in current state
    25→    this.autoNextDuration = this._getAutoNextDuration(); // ms until auto-transition (null if none)
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  _getAutoNextDuration() {
    29→    const stateDef = this.states[this.state];
    30→    if (stateDef?.auto_next) {
    31→      return stateDef.auto_next.after * 1000; // convert seconds → ms
    32→    }
    33→    return null;
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  get currentStateDef() {
    37→    return this.states[this.state];
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  get visual() {
    41→    return this.currentStateDef?.visual || this.state;
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  get particles() {
    45→    return this.currentStateDef?.particles || null;
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  get timeRemainingMs() {
    49→    if (this.autoNextDuration === null) return null;
    50→    return Math.max(0, this.autoNextDuration - this.timer);
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  // Returns a transition event if auto_next fires, or null
    54→  tick(deltaMs) {
    55→    if (this.autoNextDuration === null) return null;
    56→
    57→    this.timer += deltaMs;
    58→
    59→    if (this.timer >= this.autoNextDuration) {
    60→      const autoNext = this.currentStateDef.auto_next;
    61→      return this._transition(autoNext.state, 'auto');
    62→    }
    63→
    64→    return null;
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  // Attempt a character-triggered interaction.
    68→  // Returns a transition event, or null if no valid transition.
    69→  interact(action = 'use') {
    70→    const stateDef = this.currentStateDef;
    71→    if (!stateDef?.transitions) return null;
    72→
    73→    const transition = stateDef.transitions[action];
    74→    if (!transition) return null;
    75→
    76→    // If the transition requires a character, that's expected (caller is a character)
    77→    return this._transition(transition.next, action, transition);
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  _transition(nextState, trigger, transitionDef = null) {

Each state can have:\n     6\u2192//   - visual: string descriptor for renderer\n     7\u2192//   - particles: optional particle effect name\n     8\u2192//   - emoji: optional emoji to float on enter\n     9\u2192//   - auto_next: { state, after (seconds) } \u2014 timed auto-transition\n    10\u2192//   - transitions: { action_name: { next, duration?, requires?, produces?, target? } }\n    11\u2192//\n    12\u2192// The engine ticks all objects, advancing auto_next timers.\n    13\u2192// Characters trigger transitions via interact(objectId, action).\n    14\u2192\n    15\u2192export class ObjectInstance {\n    16\u2192  constructor(def) {\n    17\u2192    this.id = def.id;\n    18\u2192    this.name = def.name;\n    19\u2192    this.sector = def.sector;\n    20\u2192    this.arena = def.arena;\n    21\u2192    this.position = { ...def.position };\n    22\u2192    this.states = def.states;\n    23\u2192    this.state = def.state || Object.keys(def.states)[0];\n    24\u2192    this.timer = 0; // ms elapsed in current state\n    25\u2192    this.autoNextDuration = this._getAutoNextDuration(); // ms until auto-transition (null if none)\n    26\u2192  }\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192  _getAutoNextDuration() {\n    29\u2192    const stateDef = this.states[this.state];\n    30\u2192    if (stateDef?.auto_next) {\n    31\u2192      return stateDef.auto_next.after * 1000; // convert seconds \u2192 ms\n    32\u2192    }\n    33\u2192    return null;\n    34\u2192  }\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192  get currentStateDef() {\n    37\u2192    return this.states[this.state];\n    38\u2192  }\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192  get visual() {\n    41\u2192    return this.currentStateDef?.visual || this.state;\n    42\u2192  }\n    43\u2192\n    44\u2192  get particles() {\n    45\u2192    return this.currentStateDef?.particles || null;\n    46\u2192  }\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192  get timeRemainingMs() {\n    49\u2192    if (this.autoNextDuration === null) return null;\n    50\u2192    return Math.max(0, this.autoNextDuration - this.timer);\n    51\u2192  }\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192  // Returns a transition event if auto_next fires, or null\n    54\u2192  tick(deltaMs) {\n    55\u2192    if (this.autoNextDuration === null) return null;\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192    this.timer += deltaMs;\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192    if (this.timer >= this.autoNextDuration) {\n    60\u2192      const autoNext = this.currentStateDef.auto_next;\n    61\u2192      return this._transition(autoNext.state, 'auto');\n    62\u2192    }\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192    return null;\n    65\u2192  }\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192  // Attempt a character-triggered interaction.\n    68\u2192  // Returns a transition event, or null if no valid transition.\n    69\u2192  interact(action = 'use') {\n    70\u2192    const stateDef = this.currentStateDef;\n    71\u2192    if (!stateDef?.transitions) return null;\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192    const transition = stateDef.transitions[action];\n    74\u2192    if (!transition) return null;\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192    // If the transition requires a character, that's expected (caller is a character)\n    77\u2192    return this._transition(transition.next, action, transition);\n    78\u2192  }\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192  _transition(nextState, trigger, transitionDef = null) {\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

The sprites for reading, sit, and phone don't exist yet. The issue says they are "Available Assets (48x48 LimeZu sprites)" but they don't appear to be in the repository. Let me check if there's a different path where they could be stored. Looking at the issue description: > All 3 characters (Amelia/Lucy/Ash) have: > * reading_48x48.png — for bookshelf, desk > * sit_48x48.png / sit2 / sit3 — for kotatsu, TV, bed > * phone_48x48.png — general interaction fallback But the character names in the codebase are maple, sol, and nyx (not Amelia/Lucy/Ash), so the issue was using the original LimeZu asset pack names while the game renamed them. Since these assets don't exist yet, I need to figure out whether to create placeholder art or find another solution—let me check the world.js file to see what object IDs are defined and whether we have any placeholder assets available.

Looking at the world.js, let me look for which objects exist: - cafe_espresso, cafe_coffee_maker, cafe_display, cafe_register, cafe_sink → these are counter area - cafe_book → seating area - apt_stove, apt_fridge → apartment kitchen - apt_easel → apartment studio - apt_bed, apt_desk → apartment bedroom Now I'm mapping the issue's sprite requirements to actual world objects: cafe_book maps to reading, apt_desk also maps to reading, but kotatsu and tv don't exist in the world. For the sit animation, I have apt_bed but need to check what other objects might work. For phone animations, apt_stove and apt_fridge are listed, though the mapping seems incomplete. Looking at the pattern, I should match objects by their ID keywords: anything with 'book' or 'desk' triggers reading, 'bed' triggers sit, and 'stove', 'fridge', or 'easel' trigger phone as a general interaction fallback. The real question now is whether the sprite assets actually exist for these animations.

     1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""Generate clean pixel art sprites to replace broken Gemini-generated ones."""
     3→
     4→from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
     5→import os
     6→import random
     7→
     8→ASSETS = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '..', 'assets')
     9→random.seed(42)  # Reproducible
    10→
    11→def save(img, *path_parts):
    12→    p = os.path.join(ASSETS, *path_parts)
    13→    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(p), exist_ok=True)
    14→    img.save(p)
    15→    print(f"  ✓ {'/'.join(path_parts)}")
    16→
    17→def fill(size, color):
    18→    """Solid color tile."""
    19→    return Image.new('RGBA', (size, size), color)
    20→
    21→def noisy_fill(size, base_rgb, variance=10):
    22→    """Solid tile with subtle per-pixel noise for texture."""
    23→    img = Image.new('RGBA', (size, size))
    24→    for y in range(size):
    25→        for x in range(size):
    26→            r = max(0, min(255, base_rgb[0] + random.randint(-variance, variance)))
    27→            g = max(0, min(255, base_rgb[1] + random.randint(-variance, variance)))
    28→            b = max(0, min(255, base_rgb[2] + random.randint(-variance, variance)))
    29→            img.putpixel((x, y), (r, g, b, 255))
    30→    return img
    31→
    32→# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
    33→# TILES (16x16, full coverage, no transparency)
    34→# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
    35→print("=== TILES ===")
    36→
    37→# Grass variants
    38→def make_grass(base, accents, name):
    39→    img = noisy_fill(16, base, 8)
    40→    # Add grass blade accents
    41→    for _ in range(12):
    42→        x, y = random.randint(0, 15), random.randint(0, 15)
    43→        c = random.choice(accents)
    44→        img.putpixel((x, y), (*c, 255))
    45→    save(img, 'tiles', name)
    46→
    47→make_grass((74, 124, 63), [(60, 110, 50), (85, 140, 70), (65, 115, 55)], 'grass.png')
    48→make_grass((90, 140, 79), [(75, 125, 65), (100, 155, 85), (80, 135, 70)], 'grass_alt1.png')
    49→make_grass((68, 136, 68), [(55, 120, 55), (80, 150, 80), (60, 130, 60)], 'grass_alt2.png')
    50→
    51→# Path - sandy brown with pebble detail
    52→img = noisy_fill(16, (194, 168, 107), 8)
    53→for _ in range(6):
    54→    x, y = random.randint(1, 14), random.randint(1, 14)
    55→    img.putpixel((x, y), (175, 150, 90, 255))
    56→save(img, 'tiles', 'path.png')
    57→
    58→# Dirt - dark earth
    59→img = noisy_fill(16, (122, 92, 58), 6)
    60→for _ in range(5):
    61→    x, y = random.randint(0, 15), random.randint(0, 15)
    62→    img.putpixel((x, y), (100, 75, 45, 255))
    63→save(img, 'tiles', 'dirt.png')
    64→
    65→# Water - blue with shimmer highlights
    66→img = noisy_fill(16, (58, 110, 165), 10)
    67→highlights = [(6,3),(10,7),(3,11),(13,4),(8,13)]
    68→for hx, hy in highlights:
    69→    img.putpixel((hx, hy), (100, 160, 220, 255))
    70→    if hx+1 < 16:
    71→        img.putpixel((hx+1, hy), (80, 140, 200, 255))
    72→save(img, 'tiles', 'water.png')
    73→
    74→# Water edges (water-to-grass transitions)
    75→for direction, name in [('n','water_edge_n.png'),('s','water_edge_s.png'),('e','water_edge_e.png'),('w','water_edge_w.png')]:
    76→    img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16))
    77→    grass = (74, 124, 63, 255)
    78→    water = (58, 110, 165, 255)
    79→    for y in range(16):
    80→        for x in range(16):
    81→            if direction == 'n':
    82→                img.putpixel((x,y), grass if y < 6 else (water if y > 8 else (66, 117, 114, 255)))
    83→            elif direction == 's':
    84→                img.putpixel((x,y), water if y < 6 else (grass if y > 8 else (66, 117, 114, 255)))
    85→            elif direction == 'w':
    86→                img.putpixel((x,y), grass if x < 6 else (water if x > 8 else (66, 117, 114, 255)))
    87→            elif direction == 'e':
    88→                img.putpixel((x,y), water if x < 6 else (grass if x > 8 else (66, 117, 114, 255)))
    89→    save(img, 'tiles', name)
    90→
    91→# Stone - gray flagstone
    92→img = noisy_fill(16, (138, 138, 138), 8)
    93→# Grid lines for flagstone look
    94→for i in range(16):
    95→    img.putpixel((i, 7), (115, 115, 115, 255))
    96→    img.putpixel((i, 8), (115, 115, 115, 255))
    97→    img.putpixel((7, i), (115, 115, 115, 255))
    98→    img.putpixel((8, i), (115, 115, 115, 255))
    99→save(img, 'tiles', 'stone.png')
   100→
   101→# Wood floor - horizontal planks
   102→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16))
   103→plank_colors = [(139, 109, 74), (149, 119, 84), (130, 100, 65)]
   104→for y in range(16):
   105→    base = plank_colors[y // 5 % 3]
   106→    for x in range(16):
   107→        if y % 5 == 4:  # Plank gap
   108→            img.putpixel((x, y), (100, 75, 50, 255))
   109→        else:
   110→            v = random.randint(-5, 5)
   111→            img.putpixel((x, y), (base[0]+v, base[1]+v, base[2]+v, 255))
   112→save(img, 'tiles', 'wood_floor.png')
   113→
   114→# Wall - dark stone bricks
   115→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16))
   116→wall_base = (90, 74, 58)
   117→for y in range(16):
   118→    for x in range(16):
   119→        v = random.randint(-5, 5)
   120→        # Brick pattern: offset every other row
   121→        mortar = False
   122→        if y % 4 == 0:
   123→            mortar = True
   124→        elif (y // 4) % 2 == 0 and x % 8 == 0:
   125→            mortar = True
   126→        elif (y // 4) % 2 == 1 and (x + 4) % 8 == 0:
   127→            mortar = True
   128→        if mortar:
   129→            img.putpixel((x, y), (70, 58, 45, 255))
   130→        else:
   131→            img.putpixel((x, y), (wall_base[0]+v, wall_base[1]+v, wall_base[2]+v, 255))
   132→save(img, 'tiles', 'wall.png')
   133→
   134→# Wall stone variant
   135→img = noisy_fill(16, (100, 90, 80), 6)
   136→# Larger stone blocks
   137→for sy in [0, 8]:
   138→    for sx in [0, 8]:
   139→        for y in range(sy, sy+7):
   140→            img.putpixel((sx+7, y), (75, 65, 55, 255))
   141→        for x in range(sx, sx+8):
   142→            img.putpixel((x, sy+7), (75, 65, 55, 255))
   143→save(img, 'tiles', 'wall_stone.png')
   144→
   145→# Door - wooden door
   146→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16))
   147→for y in range(16):
   148→    for x in range(16):
   149→        if x <= 1 or x >= 14:  # Frame
   150→            img.putpixel((x, y), (80, 60, 40, 255))
   151→        elif y <= 1:  # Top frame
   152→            img.putpixel((x, y), (80, 60, 40, 255))
   153→        else:  # Door panels
   154→            v = random.randint(-3, 3)
   155→            img.putpixel((x, y), (107+v, 74+v, 42+v, 255))
   156→# Door handle
   157→img.putpixel((11, 9), (200, 180, 60, 255))
   158→img.putpixel((11, 10), (200, 180, 60, 255))
   159→# Center line
   160→for y in range(2, 16):
   161→    img.putpixel((7, y), (90, 65, 35, 255))
   162→    img.putpixel((8, y), (90, 65, 35, 255))
   163→save(img, 'tiles', 'door.png')
   164→
   165→# Fence
   166→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   167→fence_c = (107, 91, 58)
   168→fence_d = (85, 72, 45)
   169→# Posts at edges
   170→for y in range(4, 16):
   171→    img.putpixel((1, y), fence_c)
   172→    img.putpixel((2, y), fence_c)
   173→    img.putpixel((13, y), fence_c)
   174→    img.putpixel((14, y), fence_c)
   175→# Post tops
   176→for x in [1,2,13,14]:
   177→    img.putpixel((x, 3), fence_d)
   178→# Horizontal rails
   179→for x in range(16):
   180→    img.putpixel((x, 7), fence_c)
   181→    img.putpixel((x, 8), fence_d)
   182→    img.putpixel((x, 12), fence_c)
   183→    img.putpixel((x, 13), fence_d)
   184→save(img, 'tiles', 'fence.png')
   185→
   186→# Window - wall with glass
   187→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16))
   188→for y in range(16):
   189→    for x in range(16):
   190→        v = random.randint(-3, 3)
   191→        img.putpixel((x, y), (90+v, 74+v, 58+v, 255))
   192→# Window pane
   193→for y in range(3, 13):
   194→    for x in range(4, 12):
   195→        if x == 4 or x == 11 or y == 3 or y == 12:  # Frame
   196→            img.putpixel((x, y), (70, 55, 38, 255))
   197→        elif x == 7 or x == 8 or y == 7 or y == 8:  # Mullion
   198→            img.putpixel((x, y), (70, 55, 38, 255))
   199→        else:  # Glass
   200→            img.putpixel((x, y), (140, 180, 210, 255))
   201→# Glass highlight
   202→img.putpixel((5, 4), (180, 210, 235, 255))
   203→img.putpixel((6, 5), (170, 200, 225, 255))
   204→save(img, 'tiles', 'window.png')
   205→
   206→# Roof - thatch/tile
   207→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16))
   208→for y in range(16):
   209→    for x in range(16):
   210→        # Wave pattern for roof tiles
   211→        shade = 140 + (10 if (x + y*2) % 4 < 2 else 0) + random.randint(-5, 5)
   212→        r = min(255, shade + 20)
   213→        g = min(255, shade - 20)
   214→        b = min(255, shade - 40)
   215→        img.putpixel((x, y), (r, g, b, 255))
   216→save(img, 'tiles', 'roof.png')
   217→
   218→# Flower - grass with flowers
   219→img = noisy_fill(16, (74, 124, 63), 8)
   220→flower_colors = [(220, 80, 80), (220, 180, 60), (180, 100, 200), (255, 140, 100)]
   221→flower_positions = [(3,3),(8,5),(12,2),(5,10),(10,12),(2,14),(14,9)]
   222→for i, (fx, fy) in enumerate(flower_positions):
   223→    c = flower_colors[i % len(flower_colors)]
   224→    img.putpixel((fx, fy), (*c, 255))
   225→    # Petals
   226→    for dx, dy in [(-1,0),(1,0),(0,-1),(0,1)]:
   227→        nx, ny = fx+dx, fy+dy
   228→        if 0 <= nx < 16 and 0 <= ny < 16:
   229→            img.putpixel((nx, ny), (*c, 255))
   230→save(img, 'tiles', 'flower.png')
   231→
   232→
   233→# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   234→# OBJECTS (16x16 or 32x32, RGBA transparent bg)
   235→# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   236→print("
=== OBJECTS ===")
   237→
   238→# Bench - wooden park bench, side view
   239→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   240→brown = (139, 100, 60, 255)
   241→dark = (100, 72, 42, 255)
   242→# Seat (horizontal planks)
   243→for x in range(1, 15):
   244→    img.putpixel((x, 8), brown)
   245→    img.putpixel((x, 9), brown)
   246→    img.putpixel((x, 7), dark)
   247→# Back rest
   248→for x in range(2, 14):
   249→    img.putpixel((x, 4), brown)
   250→    img.putpixel((x, 5), brown)
   251→    img.putpixel((x, 3), dark)
   252→# Legs
   253→for y in range(10, 15):
   254→    img.putpixel((2, y), dark)
   255→    img.putpixel((3, y), dark)
   256→    img.putpixel((12, y), dark)
   257→    img.putpixel((13, y), dark)
   258→# Back supports
   259→for y in range(3, 9):
   260→    img.putpixel((2, y), dark)
   261→    img.putpixel((13, y), dark)
   262→save(img, 'objects', 'bench.png')
   263→
   264→# Oven (32x32) - stone oven, three states
   265→def make_oven(name, fire_color=None, smoke=False):
   266→    img = Image.new('RGBA', (32,32), (0,0,0,0))
   267→    stone = (130, 120, 110, 255)
   268→    dark_stone = (100, 90, 80, 255)
   269→    # Dome shape
   270→    for y in range(6, 28):
   271→        for x in range(4, 28):
   272→            # Rough dome
   273→            cx, cy = 16, 18
   274→            dx, dy = x - cx, y - cy
   275→            if dy > 0 and dy < 12 and abs(dx) < 12:
   276→                img.putpixel((x, y), stone)
   277→            elif dy <= 0 and (dx*dx + dy*dy*1.5) < 144:
   278→                img.putpixel((x, y), stone)
   279→    # Opening
   280→    for y in range(18, 26):
   281→        for x in range(11, 21):
   282→            img.putpixel((x, y), (40, 35, 30, 255))
   283→    # Chimney
   284→    for y in range(2, 10):
   285→        for x in range(18, 22):
   286→            img.putpixel((x, y), dark_stone)
   287→    # Fire glow
   288→    if fire_color:
   289→        for y in range(20, 25):
   290→            for x in range(13, 19):
   291→                img.putpixel((x, y), (*fire_color, 255))
   292→        img.putpixel((15, 19), (*fire_color, 255))
   293→        img.putpixel((16, 19), (*fire_color, 255))
   294→    # Smoke particles
   295→    if smoke:
   296→        for sx, sy in [(19,1),(20,0),(18,2),(21,1)]:
   297→            img.putpixel((sx, sy), (180, 180, 180, 150))
   298→    save(img, 'objects', name)
   299→
   300→make_oven('oven_off.png')
   301→make_oven('oven_glow.png', fire_color=(220, 120, 40))
   302→make_oven('oven_smoke.png', fire_color=(220, 120, 40), smoke=True)
   303→
   304→# Display case - bakery counter
   305→def make_display(has_bread):
   306→    img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   307→    wood = (139, 109, 74, 255)
   308→    glass = (180, 210, 230, 180)
   309→    # Counter base
   310→    for x in range(1, 15):
   311→        for y in range(10, 15):
   312→            img.putpixel((x, y), wood)
   313→    # Glass top
   314→    for x in range(1, 15):
   315→        for y in range(4, 10):
   316→            img.putpixel((x, y), glass)
   317→        img.putpixel((x, 3), (100, 80, 55, 255))
   318→    # Sides
   319→    for y in range(3, 15):
   320→        img.putpixel((0, y), (100, 80, 55, 255))
   321→        img.putpixel((15, y), (100, 80, 55, 255))
   322→    if has_bread:
   323→        # Bread loaves inside
   324→        for x in range(4, 8):
   325→            img.putpixel((x, 7), (200, 160, 80, 255))
   326→            img.putpixel((x, 8), (180, 140, 70, 255))
   327→        for x in range(9, 13):
   328→            img.putpixel((x, 7), (200, 160, 80, 255))
   329→            img.putpixel((x, 8), (180, 140, 70, 255))
   330→    name = 'display_bread.png' if has_bread else 'display_empty.png'
   331→    save(img, 'objects', name)
   332→
   333→make_display(False)
   334→make_display(True)
   335→
   336→# Soil stages
   337→def make_soil(name, stage):
   338→    img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   339→    dirt = (100, 75, 50, 255)
   340→    # Soil mound
   341→    for x in range(2, 14):
   342→        for y in range(10, 15):
   343→            img.putpixel((x, y), dirt)
   344→    for x in range(3, 13):
   345→        img.putpixel((x, 9), dirt)
   346→    for x in range(5, 11):
   347→        img.putpixel((x, 8), dirt)
   348→    
   349→    if stage == 'planted':
   350→        # Small seed dots
   351→        img.putpixel((7, 9), (60, 120, 40, 255))
   352→        img.putpixel((9, 9), (60, 120, 40, 255))
   353→    elif stage == 'growing':
   354→        # Small sprouts
   355→        for x in [6, 9]:
   356→            img.putpixel((x, 8), (60, 140, 45, 255))
   357→            img.putpixel((x, 7), (70, 155, 50, 255))
   358→            img.putpixel((x, 6), (80, 165, 55, 255))
   359→    elif stage == 'blooming':
   360→        # Full flowers
   361→        for x in [5, 8, 11]:
   362→            stem = (60, 140, 45, 255)
   363→            img.putpixel((x, 7), stem)
   364→            img.putpixel((x, 6), stem)
   365→            img.putpixel((x, 5), stem)
   366→            # Flower head
   367→            fc = random.choice([(220, 80, 80, 255), (220, 180, 60, 255), (180, 100, 200, 255)])
   368→            img.putpixel((x, 4), fc)
   369→            img.putpixel((x-1, 4), fc)
   370→            img.putpixel((x+1, 4), fc)
   371→            img.putpixel((x, 3), fc)
   372→    elif stage == 'wilted':
   373→        # Droopy brown stems
   374→        for x in [6, 9]:
   375→            img.putpixel((x, 8), (100, 90, 50, 255))
   376→            img.putpixel((x, 7), (90, 80, 45, 255))
   377→            img.putpixel((x+1, 6), (80, 70, 40, 255))
   378→    save(img, 'objects', name)
   379→
   380→make_soil('soil_empty.png', 'empty')
   381→make_soil('soil_planted.png', 'planted')
   382→make_soil('soil_growing.png', 'growing')
   383→make_soil('soil_blooming.png', 'blooming')
   384→make_soil('soil_wilted.png', 'wilted')
   385→
   386→# Watering can
   387→def make_watering_can(full):
   388→    img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   389→    metal = (140, 140, 150, 255) if not full else (120, 130, 160, 255)
   390→    dark = (100, 100, 110, 255)
   391→    # Body
   392→    for x in range(3, 11):
   393→        for y in range(7, 14):
   394→            img.putpixel((x, y), metal)
   395→    # Top rim
   396→    for x in range(3, 11):
   397→        img.putpixel((x, 6), dark)
   398→    # Spout
   399→    for i in range(5):
   400→        img.putpixel((11+i, 9-i), metal)
   401→        img.putpixel((11+i, 10-i), metal)
   402→    # Handle
   403→    for x in range(5, 9):
   404→        img.putpixel((x, 4), dark)
   405→    img.putpixel((4, 5), dark)
   406→    img.putpixel((4, 6), dark)
   407→    img.putpixel((9, 5), dark)
   408→    img.putpixel((9, 6), dark)
   409→    # Water drops if full
   410→    if full:
   411→        img.putpixel((14, 6), (100, 160, 220, 255))
   412→        img.putpixel((15, 5), (100, 160, 220, 255))
   413→        img.putpixel((13, 5), (100, 160, 220, 255))
   414→    save(img, 'objects', 'watering_can_full.png' if full else 'watering_can_empty.png')
   415→
   416→make_watering_can(False)
   417→make_watering_can(True)
   418→
   419→# Easel states
   420→def make_easel(name, state):
   421→    img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   422→    wood = (120, 90, 55, 255)
   423→    # Easel legs (A-frame)
   424→    for y in range(3, 16):
   425→        img.putpixel((3, y), wood)
   426→        img.putpixel((12, y), wood)
   427→    img.putpixel((7, 14), wood)
   428→    img.putpixel((8, 14), wood)
   429→    img.putpixel((7, 15), wood)
   430→    img.putpixel((8, 15), wood)
   431→    # Canvas area
   432→    canvas_c = (240, 235, 225, 255)
   433→    for x in range(4, 12):
   434→        for y in range(2, 10):
   435→            img.putpixel((x, y), canvas_c)
   436→    # Canvas border
   437→    for x in range(4, 12):
   438→        img.putpixel((x, 1), wood)
   439→        img.putpixel((x, 10), wood)
   440→    for y in range(1, 11):
   441→        img.putpixel((3, y), wood)
   442→        img.putpixel((12, y), wood)
   443→    # Shelf
   444→    for x in range(3, 13):
   445→        img.putpixel((x, 10), wood)
   446→    
   447→    if state == 'sketching':
   448→        # Pencil lines
   449→        for i in range(5):
   450→            img.putpixel((5+i, 4+i//2), (100, 100, 100, 255))
   451→            img.putpixel((6+i, 6), (100, 100, 100, 255))
   452→    elif state == 'painting':
   453→        # Colorful wip
   454→        colors = [(200,80,80),(80,140,200),(80,180,80),(220,180,60)]
   455→        for y in range(3, 9):
   456→            for x in range(5, 11):
   457→                c = random.choice(colors)
   458→                img.putpixel((x, y), (*c, 255))
   459→    elif state == 'finished':
   460→        # Landscape painting
   461→        # Sky
   462→        for x in range(5, 11):
   463→            for y in range(3, 5):
   464→                img.putpixel((x, y), (135, 190, 230, 255))
   465→        # Mountain
   466→        for i in range(3):
   467→            img.putpixel((7+i, 4), (120, 140, 120, 255))
   468→            img.putpixel((8, 3), (120, 140, 120, 255))
   469→        # Green ground
   470→        for x in range(5, 11):
   471→            for y in range(6, 9):
   472→                img.putpixel((x, y), (80, 150, 70, 255))
   473→        # Sun
   474→        img.putpixel((10, 3), (240, 200, 60, 255))
   475→    save(img, 'objects', name)
   476→
   477→make_easel('easel_blank.png', 'blank')
   478→make_easel('easel_sketching.png', 'sketching')
   479→make_easel('easel_painting.png', 'painting')
   480→make_easel('easel_finished.png', 'finished')
   481→
   482→# Notice board
   483→def make_notice_board(has_note):
   484→    img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   485→    wood = (120, 90, 55, 255)
   486→    dark = (90, 65, 38, 255)
   487→    # Posts
   488→    for y in range(2, 16):
   489→        img.putpixel((2, y), dark)
   490→        img.putpixel((13, y), dark)
   491→    # Board
   492→    for x in range(3, 13):
   493→        for y in range(2, 11):
   494→            img.putpixel((x, y), wood)
   495→    # Top/bottom frame
   496→    for x in range(2, 14):
   497→        img.putpixel((x, 1), dark)
   498→        img.putpixel((x, 11), dark)
   499→    if has_note:
   500→        # Paper note
   501→        for x in range(5, 11):
   502→            for y in range(4, 9):
   503→                img.putpixel((x, y), (240, 235, 210, 255))
   504→        # Pin
   505→        img.putpixel((8, 3), (200, 50, 50, 255))
   506→    save(img, 'objects', name)
   507→    
   508→for has_note, name in [(False, 'notice_board.png'), (True, 'notice_board_note.png')]:
   509→    img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   510→    wood = (120, 90, 55, 255)
   511→    dark = (90, 65, 38, 255)
   512→    for y in range(2, 16):
   513→        img.putpixel((2, y), dark)
   514→        img.putpixel((13, y), dark)
   515→    for x in range(3, 13):
   516→        for y in range(2, 11):
   517→            img.putpixel((x, y), wood)
   518→    for x in range(2, 14):
   519→        img.putpixel((x, 1), dark)
   520→        img.putpixel((x, 11), dark)
   521→    if has_note:
   522→        for x in range(5, 11):
   523→            for y in range(4, 9):
   524→                img.putpixel((x, y), (240, 235, 210, 255))
   525→        img.putpixel((8, 3), (200, 50, 50, 255))
   526→    save(img, 'objects', name)
   527→
   528→
   529→# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   530→# PROPS (if directory exists)
   531→# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   532→print("
=== PROPS ===")
   533→
   534→# Lantern
   535→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   536→red = (180, 50, 40, 255)
   537→# Body
   538→for x in range(5, 11):
   539→    for y in range(4, 13):
   540→        img.putpixel((x, y), red)
   541→# Top/bottom caps
   542→for x in range(6, 10):
   543→    img.putpixel((x, 3), (60, 60, 60, 255))
   544→    img.putpixel((x, 13), (60, 60, 60, 255))
   545→# Hook
   546→img.putpixel((7, 2), (60, 60, 60, 255))
   547→img.putpixel((8, 2), (60, 60, 60, 255))
   548→img.putpixel((7, 1), (60, 60, 60, 255))
   549→# Light slit
   550→for y in range(6, 11):
   551→    img.putpixel((7, y), (240, 200, 100, 255))
   552→    img.putpixel((8, y), (240, 200, 100, 255))
   553→save(img, 'props', 'lantern.png')
   554→
   555→# Barrel
   556→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   557→barrel_c = (130, 95, 55, 255)
   558→band = (80, 80, 90, 255)
   559→for x in range(3, 13):
   560→    for y in range(3, 15):
   561→        img.putpixel((x, y), barrel_c)
   562→# Metal bands
   563→for x in range(3, 13):
   564→    img.putpixel((x, 5), band)
   565→    img.putpixel((x, 12), band)
   566→# Rounded top
   567→for x in range(4, 12):
   568→    img.putpixel((x, 2), barrel_c)
   569→save(img, 'props', 'barrel.png')
   570→
   571→# Bush
   572→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   573→for y in range(5, 14):
   574→    for x in range(2, 14):
   575→        if (x-8)**2 + (y-10)**2 < 25:
   576→            v = random.randint(-10, 10)
   577→            img.putpixel((x, y), (60+v, 120+v, 50+v, 255))
   578→# Highlights
   579→for hx, hy in [(5,7),(9,6),(7,8)]:
   580→    img.putpixel((hx, hy), (80, 150, 65, 255))
   581→save(img, 'props', 'bush.png')
   582→
   583→# Flower pot
   584→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   585→pot = (180, 100, 60, 255)
   586→pot_d = (150, 80, 45, 255)
   587→for x in range(4, 12):
   588→    for y in range(9, 15):
   589→        img.putpixel((x, y), pot)
   590→for x in range(5, 11):
   591→    img.putpixel((x, 8), pot_d)
   592→for x in range(3, 13):
   593→    img.putpixel((x, 8), pot_d)
   594→# Flower
   595→stem = (60, 130, 45, 255)
   596→for y in range(5, 9):
   597→    img.putpixel((7, y), stem)
   598→    img.putpixel((8, y), stem)
   599→fc = (220, 80, 100, 255)
   600→for dx, dy in [(0,-1),(0,1),(-1,0),(1,0),(0,0)]:
   601→    img.putpixel((7+dx, 4+dy), fc)
   602→img.putpixel((7, 3), (240, 220, 60, 255))  # Center
   603→save(img, 'props', 'flower_pot.png')
   604→
   605→# Well
   606→img = Image.new('RGBA', (16,16), (0,0,0,0))
   607→stone = (140, 135, 125, 255)
   608→# Circular well base
   609→for y in range(8, 15):
   610→    for x in range(2, 14):
   611→        if (x-8)**2 + (y-12)**2 < 16:
   612→            img.putpixel((x, y), stone)
   613→# Water inside
   614→for y in range(10, 14):
   615→    for x in range(4, 12):
   616→        if (x-8)**2 + (y-12)**2 < 10:
   617→            img.putpixel((x, y), (50, 90, 140, 255))
   618→# Roof posts
   619→img.putpixel((3, 4), (100, 75, 50, 255))
   620→img.putpixel((3, 5), (100, 75, 50, 255))
   621→img.putpixel((3, 6), (100, 75, 50, 255))
   622→img.putpixel((3, 7), (100, 75, 50, 255))
   623→img.putpixel((12, 4), (100, 75, 50, 255))
   624→img.putpixel((12, 5), (100, 75, 50, 255))
   625→img.putpixel((12, 6), (100, 75, 50, 255))
   626→img.putpixel((12, 7), (100, 75, 50, 255))
   627→# Roof
   628→for x in range(2, 14):
   629→    img.putpixel((x, 3), (140, 90, 50, 255))
   630→    img.putpixel((x, 4), (140, 90, 50, 255))
   631→save(img, 'props', 'well.png')
   632→
   633→print("
✅ All sprites generated!")
   634→
